name: Paul Begala
subject: Iowa is at the heart of the 2026 cycle
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
I’ve been in the game a long time, so I’ve got a sense which races are going to be close and which candidates are worth getting behind.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97462?refcode=em20251108-heartland-patriots-rob-sand&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9683%2E614464%2EFKDP4z)
Peter, it’s political strategist Paul Begala.
I’ve been in the game a long time, so I’ve got a sense which races are going to be close and which candidates are worth getting behind.
I’m also very familiar with the importance of Iowa, which is why I know that Rob Sand has what it takes to win the governor’s race, for a number of reasons:
> _It’s already close. Like, really close. In fact, Sabato’s Crystal Ball recently moved it from “Likely R” to “Lean R.”_
> _The partisan insiders who’ve been at the wheel for years are historically unpopular. Before announcing she’s not running for re-election, Kim Reynolds was among the least popular governors in the country._
> _Rob Sand is a uniquely perfect candidate for this race, and his campaign gives Democrats a shot to win a race that would otherwise be out of reach._
**We’d be foolish to sleep on Iowa, and we’ve got an opportunity to make massive inroads in a tough state, but only if we support Rob Sand.[Will you please split a donation between his campaign to be Iowa’s next governor and Heartland Patriots?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97462?refcode=em20251108-9683&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9683%2E614464%2EFKDP4z)**
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97462?refcode=em20251108-9683&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9683%2E614464%2EFKDP4z)**
Rob Sand gives us a chance to move Iowa forward and pry control away from the partisan insiders and special interests that he’s gone after during his time as State Auditor.
_Some of those same insiders are even running against Rob, too._
Winning in a state like Iowa won’t be easy. It’s going to require broad, far-ranging outreach, tough conversations with folks who might not always agree with us, and forging connections based on Iowa and the needs of the community.
But the key ingredient to winning a tough race in a challenging environment is grassroots support and enthusiasm. **_And that’s Rob’s not-so-secret weapon._**
**I’m all-in on helping elect Rob as Iowa’s next governor, but he’s going to need more than just my help — _he needs yours, too, Peter._ [Can he count on you to split a $25 donation to boost his campaign and help elect a governor who will move Iowa forward?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97462?refcode=em20251108-9683&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=9683%2E614464%2EFKDP4z)**
If you have stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Rob Sand and Heartland Patriots will process instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97463?refcode=em20251108-9683&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=5&akid=9683%2E614464%2EFKDP4z) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97463?refcode=em20251108-9683&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=6&akid=9683%2E614464%2EFKDP4z) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97463?refcode=em20251108-9683&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=7&akid=9683%2E614464%2EFKDP4z) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97463?refcode=em20251108-9683&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=8&akid=9683%2E614464%2EFKDP4z) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97463?refcode=em20251108-9683&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=9&akid=9683%2E614464%2EFKDP4z) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97463?refcode=em20251108-9683&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=10&akid=9683%2E614464%2EFKDP4z) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97462?refcode=em20251108-9683&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=9683%2E614464%2EFKDP4z)

We’ve got a rare opportunity in Iowa, and it’s up to all of us to make the most of it.
Thanks,
Paul Begala

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Abdul’s the only candidate for Medicare for All and ending medical debt in his race for Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress

He eliminated $700 million in medical debt. Friend, I’m proud to endorse **Dr. Abdul El-Sayed for Michigan’s open U.S. Senate seat**. He’s running to build a government that actually works for working people, not corporations or would-be oligarchs. **Abdul is the only candidate in the race who’s never taken a dime from corporate PACs, and who has never pandered to pro genocide groups like AIPAC.**[**Could you chip in to power his grassroots campaign today?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJbLF0No64CI-SVkzJypM18cEpS14HbBNaOrp1fIcDkN2xSjYpSaqoNeYrBZgQNZA1tSD43CU0_XdeCZTT_6myJqdAKB5YiZYxIxZwl-64uLzIbuupcaY4K4COjazAIJ4z6hSyoYIhuXZJjOUjqIEAArtVRoBzmvOccMc7OYjrM18CzoE4DHmBcdhsmTvPzawyaRh5vyn9wkXS6kUERzrU2LiLrprn72rz_Ab3tLMC_3pxC1-YZYT6IvPYIDllIQr_7YQnOJXfnKaHpNksHntzcNpBFmPlwoIPZEk8vEyvkGMZ4m4FLrDqf9CBzBWYEqrVR5GOlxUjET9GJpWA2l0ZdUhNcNJ9cX2brOiNxWr7oPtTFt4zpp8I6PhXW1Qp113C1EEOwkaianSjVrdcJiDE9M8y5O9bFCswy-DwGYr6xUyWPTtK-JSpDA3ReGKltI0hi8HzXIj2G5WPGoq1Mvc9TVs9RF5TeUaZhm2BDf7nqd0/4lg/fNKfJ5nrSaW9PS7CJpvY6Q/h1/h001.7i1LYLdkK6jfz5U0zr-gznF8BDfOFDJ44kPqhQRGopA) While Abdul will focus on protecting human rights, **he’s running against one of the nation’s top recipients of AIPAC donations**. So he’s up against obscene amounts of money from AIPAC and corporate PACs that are trying to buy another seat in Congress. Abdul is also **the only candidate in the race who’s fighting for Medicare for All**. He won't waver on access to health care for all. Like me, **Abdul is also focused on ending medical debt**. No one should be punished for getting sick. As a two-time public health official,**he created programs that eliminated $700 million in medical debt for 300,000 people,** removed lead from Detroit’s elementary schools, secured free glasses for tens of thousands of kids, and made life-saving Narcan universally accessible. Tonight, I joined his town hall to talk about navigating and fixing our broken healthcare system. Together in Congress, we’ll fight for the bold changes that families need in order to thrive. Back in 2018, Abdul and I were arrested while protesting with fast food workers to raise the minimum wage and strengthen the right to form unions. Abdul is running because it shouldn’t be this hard in the richest country on Earth to afford groceries, see a doctor, or believe our kids will have it better than us.
Abdul and I also share a history of holding corporate polluters accountable and cleaning up our air and water. Here’s us together at a 2023 panel about environmental justice:
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJbLF0No64CI-SVkzJypM18ZQOUFCo999mWv53ikZOlFGAMYKVWQ0RUlfIqQ3mdv4hv3vK0m4iCmSpwKcHgwQk7AcTjbWemMP0fszZIMQ1L6TBtAEoon-dkHRV464SVS2x4PIL-hrNHWXqhStQr8pWjOqMv0mIkjJP0BQzEQ1rHHZvtl6Qcz4Jp87pp5zWJZkFR15nYWfSGPYlePtn7G9_eWLETgIu2YD1N7esZsA5H3HIPE2kyjfIFS9syKIDUI4iY7SyeVI7bh0sMPy6EGE6tQXh0Mmy4zOO3TM6Mwz-JVJgjW1T8NWEtaReM_kJzy6aldD_IvgkyLXsBEa018lxyUxn5cy1RlpYTFWGLZG6sT4vZBxZDddWeT4xHM9r8d0RmSNGtquDCsN8lVOl65zCdFzkKjJvSHcV6GFQgfTpGghhslzyG_NEzKaEXcRJN8k7jDeDa_GlRACeixnH6HWtfYzR5VJsj3n6upkDsPAOZxs/4lg/fNKfJ5nrSaW9PS7CJpvY6Q/h9/h001.494nMkaNhacPJGN8SF6GKvUglIglfJWpQPisjLs8PCw)
Born and raised in Michigan, **Abdul will be the first Muslim and the first Arab American in the U.S. Senate if he wins**.
With all the racist, Islamophobic attacks from Democrats _and_ Republicans against Zohran Mamdani, it’s clear we need more Muslims in federal office to represent _all_ Americans—and show that we belong here, including in the halls of power.
As we saw with Zohran’s win this week, we can overcome billionaire interference in our democracy if we join together and demand transformative change.
[**Let’s help elect a deeply progressive Arab American and Muslim U.S. Senator. clean_body: He eliminated $700 million in medical debt. Imagine what he can do as a U.S. Senator. | | | Friend, I’m proud to endorse Dr. Abdul El-Sayed for Michigan’s open U.S. Senate seat. He’s running to build a government that actually works for working people, not corporations or would-be oligarchs. Abdul is the only candidate in the race who’s never taken a dime from corporate PACs, and who has never pandered to pro genocide groups like AIPAC. While Abdul will focus on protecting human rights, he’s running against one of the nation’s top recipients of AIPAC donations. So he’s up against obscene amounts of money from AIPAC and corporate PACs that are trying to buy another seat in Congress. Abdul is also the only candidate in the race who’s fighting for Medicare for All. He won't waver on access to health care for all. Like me, Abdul is also focused on ending medical debt. No one should be punished for getting sick. As a two-time public health official,he created programs that eliminated $700 million in medical debt for 300,000 people, removed lead from Detroit’s elementary schools, secured free glasses for tens of thousands of kids, and made life-saving Narcan universally accessible. Tonight, I joined his town hall to talk about navigating and fixing our broken healthcare system. Together in Congress, we’ll fight for the bold changes that families need in order to thrive. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Abdul El-Sayed and Rashida Tlaib | | | | | | | | | | Back in 2018, Abdul and I were arrested while protesting with fast food workers to raise the minimum wage and strengthen the right to form unions. Abdul is running because it shouldn’t be this hard in the richest country on Earth to afford groceries, see a doctor, or believe our kids will have it better than us. Abdul and I also share a history of holding corporate polluters accountable and cleaning up our air and water. Here’s us together at a 2023 panel about environmental justice: Born and raised in Michigan, Abdul will be the first Muslim and the first Arab American in the U.S. Senate if he wins. With all the racist, Islamophobic attacks from Democrats and Republicans against Zohran Mamdani, it’s clear we need more Muslims in federal office to represent all Americans—and show that we belong here, including in the halls of power. As we saw with Zohran’s win this week, we can overcome billionaire interference in our democracy if we join together and demand transformative change. Thank you so much. In endorsing Abdul, I’m joining U.S. Senator Bernie Sanders, who will fight alongside Abdul in the Senate for Medicare for All and an arms embargo on Israel. Our fight is only beginning, and there’s so much progress ahead. With you in the fight for better, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Abdul is running to make government work for people, not corporations
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1001&akid=1254%2E251025%2EP3yxBf ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1002&akid=1254%2E251025%2EP3yxBf ]Abdul for US Senate

Peter,

Michigan has an open U.S. Senate race. This isn’t just another election,
it’s a fight for the future of our democracy.

Right now, corporate PACs and pro genocide groups like AIPAC are spending
obscene amounts of money to buy another seat in Washington, DC. They want
our next senator to be someone who will protect their profits, not our
people.

But we have a chance to send someone different. Someone who has never
taken money from corporations and pro genocide groups, and never will.

That someone is my friend, Dr. Abdul El-Sayed.

Abdul has spent his career proving that government can actually work for
the people it serves.

When Detroit’s health department was gutted, Abdul rebuilt it.

When working families couldn’t afford care, Abdul created programs that
got kids free glasses and erased hundreds of millions in medical debt.

And today, Abdul is proud to be the only candidate in the Michigan Senate
race fighting for Medicare for All.

This is the kind of leadership we deserve — courageous, compassionate, and
unbought — and that’s why I’m proud to endorse Abdul’s campaign for U.S.
Senate.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251108-1-ak.Dw7ec2&amount=10&refcode=em20251108-1246&t=1004&akid=1254%2E251025%2EP3yxBf ]This race will come down to whether working people can overcome
corporate money. I believe we can, but it starts with all of us pitching
in. Will you join me in supporting Abdul by splitting a $10
donation between our campaigns today?

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251108-1-ak.Dw7ec2&amount=10&refcode=em20251108-1246&t=1023&akid=1254%2E251025%2EP3yxBf ]Donate $10 ››

Abdul is running against one of the nation’s top recipients of AIPAC
funds. He is running to protect human rights in our country and around the
world, and he’s running to make our government work for people — not
corporations. Let’s show him he’s not in that fight alone.

Thank you,

Rashida

[ Rashida ]Rashida Tlaib

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. To contribute via check, please address it to Abdul for U.S. Senate, PO Box 126, St. Clair Shores, MI 48080.

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1024&akid=1254%2E251025%2EP3yxBf
Update Your Information: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/update-your-information
Unsubscribe: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1025&akid=1254%2E251025%2EP3yxBf

Email us: info@abdulformichigan.com

Paid for by Abdul for U.S. Senate

[Share The Goldstein Substack](https://substack.._ln8GPJMioFJi8HLsEIEKGjgin-RdwM1dF2UQxew4g4?)
_**On November 7th, more than 80 leaders representing tens of millions of American Christians sent a message to President Trump in advance of his meeting with Syria 's installed president Ahmed al-Sharaa (also known by his nom de guerre Abu Mohammad al-Julani) on November 10th.**_
Since Al-Sharaa got rid of his military fatigues, trimmed his beard and put on a designer suit, there has been a genocide in Syria taking the lives of the Druze, Christians, Alawites and Kurds.
Before he became the President of Syria this was his appearance.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5654fadc-f293-49d3-b6ee-b307934ea11d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**YES THERE WAS A BOUNTY BY THE US GOVERNMENT ON HIM**
The former head of Syria's al-Nusra Front had [a $10m bounty](https://substack.com/redirect/99c00f64-7301-4272-94e3-35534f28731d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on his head for organising "multiple terrorist attacks throughout Syria, often targeting civilians".
Since coming to power, Al-Sharaa has had quite the makeover:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/dbb5e36b-b6a3-4435-94b5-1c0a3e3f745d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Ahmed al-Sharaa and Marco Rubio at the Lotte New York Palace Hotel in New York on 22 September 2025. Photograph: Bing Guan/AFP/Getty Images
**No More Bounty**
In December 2024, the US (under the Biden Administration) removed that bounty off of his head. Since then, the new Syrian regime, after the removal of Assad by opposition forces on December 8, 2024. With the rise of Al-Shaara, attacks on religious and ethnic minorities began culminating in a genocide, especially to the Druze and Christians in Southern Syria in Sweida.
**JULY GENOCIDE**
On July 13, 2025, the Druze population of Suwayda has been the target of systematic terrorist attacks carried out by jihadist groups, including ISIS (Daesh) and Hay'at Tahrir al-Sham (HTS); these hits are alleged to have been in coordination with forces belonging to the Syrian Interim Government.
**Death Toll**
Since August 2025, more than 2,000 Druze civilians had been killed, over 8,000 injured, and around 600 kidnapped or disappeared as more than 45 villages were attacked. Approximately 25 of those villages were destroyed, and approximately 220,000 residents displaced from their homes.
**National Association of Christian Lawmakers (NACL) recognizes the Genocide earlier this year.**
The [National Association of Christian Lawmakers](https://substack.com/redirect/25f2556e-ec48-47f4-ab92-87e5e2ef1a0a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), led by President Jason Rapert (former Arkansas State Senator) met with a delegation of Israeli Druze leaders that came to the United States in September to advocate on behalf of the Druze and Christians in Syria for humanitarian aid, a humanitarian corridor and to preserve and protect religious freedom. Following those meetings, the NACL passed an emergency resolution to recognize the genocide in Syria to Christians, Druze, Alawites and other ethnic and religious minorities.
**This Latest Letter by American Christians is a Demonstration of Support for Religious Freedom and a Need for a Humanitarian Corridor.**
The Letter to President Trump stresses the need for Trump to secure from Al-Sharaa a Humanitarian Corridor from Hader to Suwayda in Southern Syria to restore aid to the Druze and Christians in Suwayda who have been cut off from aid since July.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f3633fd5-ca66-492f-9230-d8893c1304d3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Image courtesy of Save the Persecuted Christians ](https://substack.com/redirect/c296d767-d520-4683-81fb-29db19a7a380?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Save the Persecuted Christians also posted a video -
[](https://substack.com/redirect/5f5327d9-0cb7-4eeb-b7f8-3d74b6f6ea07?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
_**The hope is that this meeting will be fruitful and that Syria will simply not get its sanctions rescinded under the bipartisan and bicameral coalition to repeal of the Caesar Syria Civilian Protection Act in the 2026 National Defense Authorization Act (NDAA) which is supported by the Trump Administration.**_
More will be revealed following that meeting on Monday.

---
Peter, you may have seen my campaign motto by now: _**Tested. Trusted. Tough.**_ It's not just a slogan, and I'd like to explain it to you.
---
|
---
**TESTED.** I don't back down from challenges. During my time in the legislature, I helped pass difficult budgets, and when it came down to saving the PFD, I went against party bosses and voted with the PEOPLE of Alaska. After winning five elections during my career in public service, I know how to win, make friends, and my experience uniquely qualifies me to be a strong steward of our state. **TRUSTED.** During my time in Juneau and at the Department of Corrections, I earned the trust of my constituents, fellow Republicans, co-workers, and even Democrats! It's because of my dedication to our state and helping people that I've also earned the title **"Uncorruptible"**. It takes time to gain trust, and I continue to live and work with respect for everyone I meet, even if we disagree. **TOUGH.** Listen, you'll never get anything done in Juneau unless you have that true Alaskan grit. _**Don't mistake my kindness for weakness. **_ I'm a compassionate conservative, but when it's time to suit up and fight for what's right, I'm the woman in the arena.
---
|
---
I'm not in this race to be louder. I'm in it to get to work, as I always have been. [_**Please consider supporting my campaign with $5 or any generous amount so we can get Juneau to work for YOU and STRENGTHEN our great state.**_](http://links.mail.nancyforalaska.com/u/click?_t=070db738c7d848a188c7a9e8a29f1bde&_m=107128264bc74960842387d2c7000a5b&_e=2JXy49EDrRYwxjQdhwVgfIiz3SksUbtbvG_CtDX6qxZdpjgUe0HjNFqv-190fII3FVyWC6u303n2fYBn4Fm-m5Aoe9P2v63XroWZbeHPrSBSCIy4bbXIa-fUcZLytUPfn2iyBK59qaf3gd8litqWPfNtONcvFwniqxQCUMY5HiWv3tdZQ0Ubioi3ibT7vN6VWkazO2Zs2FAxHwyJa6pNpvvwHfIdkG1HOcatrSAmEHv5LBsp0t3hx9FeM0NJyaYkctV2qjTkS2To9ctdyWhFZ0O003IOBNdK6s9voxyv3BKBPPO9QQsl3kcQJAsEP-H0TtFIKjRbkZgLdjB3saEpcbUUzCeUhpANlyGsBDotVsO_MBwSklBqJ13h_st6kWkdCTjS4coUX52U4v6OaVfKc7tzu7SIHxcgVrmfcVhCZH0qPo7V3t3oYLeT7Myk-b2YM9h4j9YbBVV7Y9JzG0P4YbvxIHNB0PCNLicMEYLf85I7pjfhYTXcjLvwQKolv6rS1WylCbDTonmi5n96HMtv46LPDpLsi0MnM-c1wJ53uaabgh1er2rxH3kMyX3Vy0iIGuqpcspDOKZVtZOP_37BHrAFdD29xe-uIhpz-Sn9F8oK7uViziwcCM1HLcZqMzsvkmrDlM2H7AQFixYA4RsbV918I8N4VCqeFdQoCbiZ4uA%3D) **Nancy Dahlstrom

clean_body: Tested. Trusted. Tough.| | | Peter, you may have seen my campaign motto by now: Tested. Trusted. Tough. It's not just a slogan, and I'd like to explain it to you. | TESTED. I don't back down from challenges. During my time in the legislature, I helped pass difficult budgets, and when it came down to saving the PFD, I went against party bosses and voted with the PEOPLE of Alaska. After winning five elections during my career in public service, I know how to win, make friends, and my experience uniquely qualifies me to be a strong steward of our state. TRUSTED. During my time in Juneau and at the Department of Corrections, I earned the trust of my constituents, fellow Republicans, co-workers, and even Democrats! It's because of my dedication to our state and helping people that I've also earned the title "Uncorruptible". It takes time to gain trust, and I continue to live and work with respect for everyone I meet, even if we disagree. TOUGH. Listen, you'll never get anything done in Juneau unless you have that true Alaskan grit. Don't mistake my kindness for weakness. I'm a compassionate conservative, but when it's time to suit up and fight for what's right, I'm the woman in the arena. | I'm not in this race to be louder. I'm in it to get to work, as I always have been. Nancy Dahlstrom Alaska's Lieutenant Governor & Your 2026 Republican Candidate for Governor | | | | | ---|---|---

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z11oo7g3p3kb56gtdd8bihlknr79c4m4ap2bc218_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cdge6o31cph2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfnq31hb7pd1r2v2ao6r1nqr9cmbpivf1o7da5po_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cdge6o31cph2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6cj2pbaqodvdj5q9hah6ph21q7okij3ilfmf8f8_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cdge6o31cph2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsg4r4i0l39aafv8iknpv5igdhg8vrokm0s3m1to_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cdge6o31cph2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb4l6lf00d5l00t17ts9ta1heoo8qjmmau0fp23g_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cdge6o31cph2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znage1tchs4r2agjat96vfqn4uh8g726cbeidseo_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cdge6o31cph2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs90i0p1si7n5dj68lf8at16jhhvg9slb79ufnp8_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cdge6o31cph2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z00bemkeqap8vr3ajafgh0qgueomqeiph4aivmjo_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cdge6o31cph2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---

---

---

---

| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvpm6dd5n67aa8q2m4d8selj8mvdefbk8kstkk30_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cdge6p76cdh2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsfrpdo229b5v89nou8dbvcbhu6ocrqe8dp3gnvo_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cdge6p76cdh2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrga4bsqse1a3neojn1d0dhsvi7pboi5bcoben4o_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cdge6p76cdh2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z21n4qj71aknvjj10hmjov58n14o0l5d130a6pp8_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cdge6p76cdh2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,

name: Jake Warner
subject: Supreme Court heard free speech case
body:
The fight to keep men out of women’s sports isn’t over.

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5tjcfnd255ckflinoeopgjb5ih49bmm387r2700_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cdge1pr6cjh2bs)
Dear Fellow American, Trauma. Addiction. Depression. Personality disorders.

This world is full of people who need a trusted person to guide them through their mental health issues.

Kaley Chiles is a licensed counselor and committed Christian. Many of Kaley's clients come to her because they share her Christian worldview and faith-based values.

But Colorado law bans counselors from having private conversations with young clients that could help them regain comfort with their God-given sex--rather than pushing them one step closer to dangerous gender-transition drugs and surgeries.

Kaley has already had to start censoring herself to avoid potential fines of $5,000 for each offense and even the loss of her license.

This law violates freedom of speech. The government has no business censoring conversations between clients and counselors.

We are working with Kaley and other counselors to stop this government censorship. We're excited the U.S. Supreme Court heard oral arguments for this case on October 7th.

Will you stand with Kaley?

Click this link to stand with Kaley Chiles and her constitutional right to speak with clients about their shared faith-based values.

clean_body: The fight to keep men out of women’s sports isn’t over. | | | Dear Fellow American, Trauma. Addiction. Depression. Personality disorders. This world is full of people who need a trusted person to guide them through their mental health issues. Kaley Chiles is a licensed counselor and committed Christian. Many of Kaley's clients come to her because they share her Christian worldview and faith-based values. But Colorado law bans counselors from having private conversations with young clients that could help them regain comfort with their God-given sex--rather than pushing them one step closer to dangerous gender-transition drugs and surgeries. Kaley has already had to start censoring herself to avoid potential fines of $5,000 for each offense and even the loss of her license. This law violates freedom of speech. The government has no business censoring conversations between clients and counselors. We are working with Kaley and other counselors to stop this government censorship. We're excited the U.S. Supreme Court heard oral arguments for this case on October 7th. Will you stand with Kaley? Click this link to stand with Kaley Chiles and her constitutional right to speak with clients about their shared faith-based values. For freedom, Jake Warner Senior Counsel Alliance Defending Freedom 15100 N. 90th Street, Scottsdale, Arizona 85260 Pop Acta Media | ICYMI News PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: The Turning Point USA Team
subject: His words are now our mission
body:
Charlie didn’t just talk about it. He built a movement that’s changed history.

| | |
---
Friend,Charlie Kirk knew something long before the rest of America caught on. That the next generation of young Americans were desperate for** ** truth... That the Left's grip on the culture wasn't as strong as it looked... And with boldness, hard work, and a focused strategy -- WE COULD WIN. Charlie didn't just talk about it. _He built a movement that's changed history._ **And long before he left us... he wrote ****_How We Win_**** -- the playbook that lays it all out.**
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf6mookf4dctbbcte8uaodo194kjmrh3kf4hldd8_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cdiecoj4c3h2bs)
---
Today, Turning Point USA wants to send it to you for FREE when you make a gift of any amount to carry Charlie's mission forward.
---
[ **Make My Gift &**
**Claim My FREE Book**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvi7tkckf6p9ue4g3r1f8uqkphq8gga6p74il21g_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cdiecoj4c3h2bs)
---
Friend, this isn't just a book... **It 's the exact blueprint Charlie used to:** 🔥 Launch Turning Point USA chapters in all 50 states
🔥 Wake up more than 820,000 student activists
🔥 Inspire a historic generational shift toward FREEDOM Charlie saw it coming before anyone else did. He showed the world that the American Culture War wasn't lost. While the media said Gen Z was gone, Charlie believed in them. He met them face to face. On the campuses. At the rallies. In the fight. He proved the Left and the Fake News Media wrong. **He showed us HOW WE WIN.**
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh9t2uhlqremm91oqbenb9l6r9mdvitdkj0kn18o_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cdiecoj4c3h2bs)
---
Now it's up to us to finish what he started. You and I have the opportunity to carry his torch, reach the next student, change more hearts and minds, and save the future of America. _But we can't do it without grassroots patriots like you._ **_How We Win_**** is the game plan -- written in Charlie's words, forged in real fights, and ready to be handed to the next bold American who says "YES, I'll stand up."** Let that be you, Friend. This book isn't a political piece... It's not about playing games in the D.C. swamp... It's a blueprint for taking back our culture and rebuilding the foundations of this country. **Faith. Freedom. body:
News, events, and action items to keep Nebraska red and growing strong.
| | | | |
---
| Letter from the Chair
---
Dear Fellow Republicans,
The NEGOP is proudly reinstituting our Founders' Days Dinner on December 11th. I hope many of you will join us--attending, sponsoring, and supporting our critical fundraising for 2026 Get-Out-the-Vote (GOTV) efforts. Our candidate recruitment and workshops have yielded strong results, but GOTV is the linchpin of victory. We've crafted a comprehensive plan to boost all Republican candidates up and down the ballot. Without funding, however, even the best plan is just words on paper.
November roared in like a lion. The State Treasurer's office saw swift change: Tom Briese stepped down, and Governor Jim Pillen promptly appointed Fremont Mayor Joey Spellenberg to the role. Kudos to all involved for keeping it under wraps--a rarity in Nebraska politics. Even former Senator Julie Slama was surprised, ending her brief two-day candidacy.
On a graver note, Senator Dan McKeon faces accusations of inappropriate conduct. The NEGOP will not join calls for his resignation; we trust justice to take its course. Yet I must highlight the stark contrast in responses. Republicans swiftly condemned Senator McKeon, while Democrats have been silent amid NU Regent Elizabeth O'Connor's charges of drunken driving causing injury to children. Regent O'Connor has ignored resignation demands entirely. Frankly, the GOP outcry against McKeon has been far louder than any toward O'Connor.
Why raise this now, amid my usual optimism? Tuesday's elections in blue states saw Republicans underperform compared to 2024. Voters won't rally behind a party that fails to rally behind itself. Pulling together isn't just ideal--it's essential. We must give each other the benefit of the doubt and close ranks.
Per the Nebraska Secretary of State, 622,765 registered Republicans comprise 49.5% of the state's 1,257,480 voters. With contentious 2026 races ahead and Democrats energized, county conventions leading to the primary are our chance to refocus. Let's unite against the radical Democrat agenda and build a party worth voting for.
See you December 11th--together, we win.

Mary Jane Truemper Chairman, Nebraska Republican Party
---
---
| | [CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://feyrpzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VSwCBThk4vKp__D-cjAPnKGlRr8F_4MTzb4NSTMJK8eY9SDeem6yd_HXpb0W_8_s8hcyW_AKxbecV5kyBKRgBn26UvHoGuijSD-Pq7zm0Qe-CH1Su6nJk01gm-DDS917NM0HHZVDSh5oNTejQsbMufOWQ8y3fCTy&c=QE5exQbEdulkTrI68tgx1CkyvSLR0b-lB_6w-RAdxVuVB_cSrS7TuQ==&ch=rTxDJVr-MkryyTWI_tjyFp5DJIfCSKYvKVGyVLUuyz3UAs6BE7qJXw==)
---
| WHAT'S HAPPENING...
From the legislative desk of Jeanne Reigle...
As your Government Relations Director, I'm witnessing a wave of determination sweeping through our party as we gear up for the Second Session of the 109th Legislature. With our bold Legislative Plan--adopted with resounding solidarity in August--now in hand, we're poised to champion the conservative values that define Nebraska's brighter future: from protecting life and our electoral integrity to empowering parents and securing our borders.
What excites me most? Our upcoming meetings with Republican senators, side by side with Chairman Mary Jane Truemper. These aren't just discussions--they're the spark of true collaboration, where fresh ideas ignite action and shared vision turns plans into progress. Together, we'll bridge any gaps, harness our majority, and deliver wins for families, farmers, and freedoms across the Cornhusker State. This is our moment. We're built to win, and we will--building a Nebraska where opportunity thrives and principles prevail.
Let's charge ahead with hope and heart!
Jeanne Reigle Government Relations Nebraska Republican Party govrelations[@ne.gop](mailto:political@ne.gop)
---

subject: I know you'll step up to the plate

body:
I set an ambitious goal

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
Peter, I set an ambitious goal for our November end-of-month deadline. 2025 is soon coming to a close, and I want to end on a high note.

Unfortunately, we’re pacing to finish thousands short of this crucial goal. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today, Peter. I know I can count on a supporter like you to chip in and help us dig out of this hole. [**Will you chip in now to help me crush this major goal?**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
[ **CHIP IN NOW** ](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
If we can reach this goal, we will send a message to the Washington Establishment that we are ready for change.

Thank you,
---
[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._dHODL7jW8w2oA)
---
Congressman Troy Downing

subject: Boeing Planes Grounded, Record-Breaking Couple, and a Death-Ball Sponge
body:
Boeing has recommended that FedEx, UPS and Western Global [ground close to 70 MD-11 aircrafts](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGq5CAYBeCnMZ1Bf40xhcXCkm62WZYtg4m_iRejQZ0Z5u0vM69w6wOH853_t-VmQwxp_2NPNM3nJeGzRmwNy7JmDGm_ok1Y95LvyaEruOWyAIOBck7ZtDgb4muRnTMeEVB0aPioQGklpOoOM3EQsEkmLIyjG5kWfF25HJjSk3fadsG82zhnE-dskLJfB6GVYtOgvVeD00QydKHl0n_lkNqBPr7yA0u_5bOL5mjtqkT8IjATmO26vQX9nt8xgfnfXwKzD8lGeuYTU6v0flX6UdGt2HpQh82GiI6mVlcCc225vIiYgyPiN4dRcCHZ2BXjrmeIMVQ1Esn204b42dB-dNzDwHcAAAD___EGgEk) after a UPS cargo plane crashed shortly after taking off from Louisville Muhammad Ali International Airport in Kentucky earlier this week, killing 14 people.

| | |

# Sunday, November 9, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1989, East German officials [opened the Berlin Wall](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D1uwyAUAODT4C0Wf8Z4YIjUekvXSl0Q4T1sGgIRxol8-6q9Qi_wDd_nxV5cTDEvH-6OpoViM762hK1htdeCMS-P5DJuSy17BoSKvlTLKR9OjJ3oZMHFdFjZgQmIHEWHho2KK62EVN1qAoyAfkSvR60xKBCTcJNzXgjwwcsuml-NMToxRgcp--sgtFJ0GnQIagBNJEWIrdT-u8TcVgzpKE-svS_3Lpm1tcdGxJnwmfD5KHvb-ysSPkdxfh_bTX25GxFzQNf2ikS8baurCF018HjFlOKmRiLpcncx_ZHtXw9Pw38CAAD__-BSceE), allowing travel from East to West Berlin. The following day, celebrating Germans began to tear the wall down. The Jenny Craig brand once dominated the market for frozen dietary meals, but both it and its founder faced a series of setbacks, as noted in today's [_Whatever_ Happened To...](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD3O4yAUAE-DOyL8bIhdUGzjLttuafHzDC_CYGGSyLdf5bvCV480I82_x_owlCiHv2ZH3bayZvycCVvDutqClMORTMYz1PLKHn1FV-oKAiTvey7m1RtK1zp2Xm-IgEOHur8rUJMaRtVFPaFT90nODqQHa-VmvACrjEE3S3BDR_pr63sx972Q43izcpiUErOctk1JP7FRoKdW6u1ZKLeIW7rKG-vNlb1LOrZ2nGz4w2BhsOzGvnaLX8ZgObAcCRksT8z54q4aCtwE5Bkb_5TaInemIlYeKcREIbaTb6-UuKUSqjnixWDpqvbHh1KiU93ZKMJuKP3U26-WvTX8DwAA__9yYYIi) segment. If you're looking for your next investment opportunity, today's sponsor is [ Westbound & Down](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMGOpSAQRb8GdxookNYFi0k6b9eznSVBKbUmCAbwmff3E99M5gd6W_ek7s359WW_HAWK60-3o6lLshGvErBWzHZKSHE9gotY1pzO6NFnnFO2wKFvhWj5aL2j8LKq8WZBBJQNGvGhQQ9aKt1sZlFKw-TFOAEMwmvoNaCekYOatJt8Q-b-JgQfheC9Ut3Uy0FrPvbDsujeD0xx9FRT7n4ninXDJbzSE3M3p70JZqv1KEz-YPBg8KD4xFK7C0ud7sUuep-ueLM3IB9n3W1JZ56RyU_cHQUG-j7u6Oncmfw8HPn2cLlGzGWj418-u_1wtMY38T8UA29lL-1fGWek6qwchARQ46jHJht_XBQCFf3BFF_vwvfw-i3bTwN_AgAA__9RhZQ8)—Colorado’s most-awarded craft brewery, now opening its doors to early-stage investors.
|
---
## Flight Cancellations Expected to Rise
The Federal Aviation Administration plans to [gradually cut air travel by up to 10%](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMGK5CAYhJ_G3AzRGBMPHhaW3HovyzDHYPQ3_oOtjdrd5O2HzCvMtQqK-r7P23YzGDEd_8wddPN5S_CuEVqDsu0ZMB2PaBLUo-RncuAK2Fw2PvCJMkYHtTmD8dxE57QH4DB2oNksuVzkKGQX9G6lAq4Em9QuZjG7nVk5LkKAZNKA6VBfa4wNirFhEqLfp3GRclDT4r2c3ELEAA5bLv1XxtQC-HjmF5Te5nsXdWjtUcn4h_CV8NXs9iLoj3zVhK8f_68US8QElVqTLEQanskVcJX6iEdolfqCzpy0hmdz-Z1obQWaDVAJX2vL5STjio6Mfxmf-bxMXHVFu8cbY8QqZyKG424w_lxqv_L40vw7AAD__wVQh1o) if air traffic controllers keep calling out in higher numbers during the government shutdown, according to Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy. On Saturday, a total of [1,762 flights were delayed, while 870 flights were canceled](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L3upCAUBfCnwc4JH4JSUGxjN9tuaRi56N0gGLgzE99-477Cvz2_5Jzk_HkuT48J8_bbH-AoliXDtyUggrq8CmDezuQztK2Wdw4QKqylLpJL3QvRc7sEj-lahi64CCBBdeDEaKSZjBpMt7sXHyc7KGX1KLi0ow2jBKHNqJSRNuoO3d0mBLdCcD0Mj5dWkzHc6ilGo8PEBg4BqdTH34KZdojpKh-oj7UcXXI70dmY-sXkzORMO-yY0m1MzmdJuF53XH1uZ6nkCUtmctbaGi1UHxNuO_UVwnu9qfV4nH6l1nusCTP0Pvt0NWJy7qoL5xdTwmZGNvDt8Ph_qaMfXfdx8l8AAAD__yZVgoE), with more than 16 air traffic control facilities across the country reporting shortages in staff. Meanwhile, senators are [working through the weekend](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLvO3CAUhJ_G7ryCYy6moEiz3aZNaXE52EQYLMC72rePnFf4y9FIo_m-P6_1ZWKKefttDtQ9lDXjpyXsHetqC8a8nclkbFstV_boK7pSVyDAJ0onolZvYvqubPQ6IALOI2oqBYhFzEyMu6ZmDp5bbuzCHAmCS6YYdQyCBReCH6O-1yglilLCGXtYPi9CEMWXEAT3y8AI-thLffwtMfcdQ_qWN9aHK8eY9N772Yb51wDPAZ7mvAHu6g61R5dwgGfbr-7LJ08Ns-k49f3KODW3XwfWqdfrOCdl6QKKA5cSgCsiCXo5cwEOGVo7j1X78xNTik3IgZHtMDH9P9F_ZO6t4V8AAAD__8UigYA) for the first time since the shutdown began 40 days ago. GOP leaders have signaled an openness to an emerging proposal from a small group of moderate Democrats to reopen the government in exchange for a vote at a later date to extend the Affordable Care Act tax credits that expire at the end of the year.
## Cargo Planes Grounded After UPS Crash
Boeing urged FedEx, UPS, and Western Global to[ ground about 70 MD-11 aircraft](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGq5CAYBeCnMZ1Bf40xhcXCkm62WZYtg4m_iRejQZ0Z5u0vM69w6wOH853_t-VmQwxp_2NPNM3nJeGzRmwNy7JmDGm_ok1Y95LvyaEruOWyAIOBck7ZtDgb4muRnTMeEVB0aPioQGklpOoOM3EQsEkmLIyjG5kWfF25HJjSk3fadsG82zhnE-dskLJfB6GVYtOgvVeD00QydKHl0n_lkNqBPr7yA0u_5bOL5mjtqkT8IjATmO26vQX9nt8xgfnfXwKzD8lGeuYTU6v0flX6UdGt2HpQh82GiI6mVlcCc225vIiYgyPiN4dRcCHZ2BXjrmeIMVQ1Esn204b42dB-dNzDwHcAAAD___EGgEk) after a UPS cargo plane crashed shortly after takeoff from Louisville, Kentucky, killing 14 people. UPS has temporarily grounded part of its fleet, and FedEx confirmed it is immediately grounding its 28 MD-11 planes. The cockpit voice recorder [captured a bell that sounded](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO6yAURL_G7ogAA8YFxWvS5bVbWhgu9t1gsIAkm79fOb-w5Wik0ZzzdZtvFiOm9b_dwbSQ5wSvGqE1KPOSAdN6RJugriU_kgdfwOUyc8olYYzQafYW43sWvTcBgMPQg2Gj4kqrQah-M1Q667TloIO2QQ3CeWmFGt0IIdAw9mjONcboxBiVQlwWOWil6CR1CEp63QkKHlsul--MqW0Q4js_oVxc3vtottaO2g3_On7t-NUeJ8BZnaE0dBE6fn0clXxAiCu2bgR-jpgr5kTukNrD3d_kia7hXomUmquJU6_EQoFK5icnJxGWgTtng-6L8ccLY8Sqxk7QdbcYP1_anwQ-Df8NAAD___zIhO4) about 37 seconds after the crew called for takeoff thrust, but investigators haven’t determined why the bell rang. The aircraft was [carrying 38,000 gallons of fuel](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0Ltu7CAYBOCnwd1agLkWFKdxt6dNibj8eIlYsDBZZ98-cl4h3UgjfdLMx93eXS65bv_dE8xIzVY4jwJjQLe-Qa7bXlyFY-vtq0aIHULrlmLKb4TcsLbR5fK2bIomAVBYJjBECiqUWJiYHkZhkWTQkvOgtJZahMC88gshnDkHYcrm0gjBmhDMGZs9X5QQWHOVkuBRIYYh5tH6_NlyHQ9I5d1e0OfQnlMxjzH2Ay3_EF0RXc_znL0PV4foeo1BdHV95FDgiuGb7p2_5a5xm7qJ-5lLyYeQiOHt6XL5VcefrngZ-hMAAP__FBtxtw) as it took off for Hawaii, which contributed to the size of the fire after the crash.
## List: Most Popular Baby Names in 2025
Olivia remained the [most popular girl’s name](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1urDAUhJ_GdCD7-GehcHEbur1tSnTAB9aRsZHtXbRvH5EUeYC0M6OZ0fdxn-7og4_bf9zJ1jVNkc4SqFbK05zIx-0IGKlsOT2jI5dpSXkCDroVouXD5NCH96QaZ1ciINmQFTcDpjdSmeZhtehpULPUMJDEwSzSILiZ02JQcxSNt1ebEHwQgmululnL3hg-6H5djXY9U5ycryl3n8nH-qA1vNOLcrekvQn2UetRmPzHYGQwnufZzTi_F4r1J8JgvIQ24k6FwbinUtsjHc-AmcFY09H--u31pcnWHacPwRdzY4pvO_rwvVb_hOhl4SsAAP__hFx6tQ) in 2025, and Noah topped the list for boys for the third consecutive year, according to a recent survey of baby names. The top five girls' names include Amelia, Sophia, Emma, and Isabella. The boys’ list is rounded out by Liam, Oliver, Elijah, and Mateo. A few [vintage names](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOrCAUgOGnwU5zOCKjBcVt7Oa2W5KjHBw2CBNkxvj2m9lX2PpPvuL_uts7hRjS9p92NtVnm_g8ItfKxS6ZQ9qekRIfW8mv5NgVXnOxCDi0UrYwWUchXlY1znhm5L5hI28a9ah7pZuHoZXg5pEWhXLEAXly0JNSGqBn58YmmI8mJUxSwqBUtwz9qDVMw-i9HtwoFLALNZfuO4dUH-zjld9cujXvTTSPWp-H6P8JnAXO53l2xX2SwJlKDWtkgbMEaC-m0pZX5Hah5WoT7XwInJti3PMMMYZD34SCbacQf-36pyFvgz8BAAD__6Xnc3w) returned to the top 100, including Josephine (away since 1943) and Vivian (1934). For the boys, Arthur returns to the top 100 for the first time since 1970, and Nathaniel is back after a nine-year absence.

**Whatever happened to Jenny Craig?** In the 1980s, the Jenny Craig brand of frozen, ready-made food for dieters became a sensation in the U.S. after being launched in Australia by Jenny Craig and her business-partner-turned-husband, Sid Craig. Jenny, born Genevieve Guidroz, became the face of the brand. It had a powerful hook: portion-controlled frozen meals plus one-on-one coaching. You can see one of [the original Australian TV ads with Jenny here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L-K7CAcxfGn0W6C_5MUFhcu083AVstW4sSfiYujwZhI3n7JvsK258Cn-H4-zMOGGNL8tG_Q1WeToG0RaoViXhlCmtdoE2xzyXty4ApMuRhGmLxReiOjcTbE0wjstAdgwDFo2iumBsWFwosGR4lgfKTcKykpEKZY75ykUvTMuh4HfWmUkpFSIoXoXpIPSpFRDt4r6QYkCLhQc-m-c0h1AR_PfEDppvzGUS-1rhvi_xC7I3ZvrXVn3uv-guu_FlunBfH7gfj_DzGZ59RmKb9w0W5tIcawqR4JMr9tiL9k_VOHQ7OfAAAA__8sbm_j). The company grew fast and went public in 1991, but its rapid rise brought regulatory problems, as did its flirtation with fen-phen weight-loss drugs shortly before that combo was linked to serious heart risks and pulled from the market. Still, the brand had a core strength: Jenny Craig herself, a sympathetic mom who had struggled with weight issues. That changed in 1995 when Jenny suffered a jaw injury that left her temporarily unable to speak, prompting her retirement as the company's main spokesperson. Nestlé bought the company for roughly $600 million in 2006 and managed its decline for a time, but in 2023 the Jenny Craig brand declared bankruptcy and was acquired by Wellful—the parent of Nutrisystem. It's now a direct-to-consumer, digital-first service: meals shipped, coaching online, no storefronts. [As for Jenny, the person](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD3O4yAUAE-DOyL8bIhdUGzjLttuafHzDC_CYGGSyLdf5bvCV480I82_x_owlCiHv2ZH3bayZvycCVvDutqClMORTMYz1PLKHn1FV-oKAiTvey7m1RtK1zp2Xm-IgEOHur8rUJMaRtVFPaFT90nODqQHa-VmvACrjEE3S3BDR_pr63sx972Q43izcpiUErOctk1JP7FRoKdW6u1ZKLeIW7rKG-vNlb1LOrZ2nGz4w2BhsOzGvnaLX8ZgObAcCRksT8z54q4aCtwE5Bkb_5TaInemIlYeKcREIbaTb6-UuKUSqjnixWDpqvbHh1KiU93ZKMJuKP3U26-WvTX8DwAA__9yYYIi), she and her husband, Sid, who died in 2008, became significant philanthropists. They committed millions to Fresno State University, whose business school was named the Sid Craig School of Business.

More recently, in 2022, she pledged $5 million to The National WWII Museum in New Orleans to create the Jenny Craig Institute for the Study of War and Democracy. Now 93, she's noted as being passionate about supporting military families. _Were you a Jenny Craig customer? Let us know your thoughts by replying to this email._

In the 1980s, the Jenny Craig brand of frozen, ready-made food for dieters became a sensation in the U.S. after being launched in Australia by Jenny Craig and her business-partner-turned-husband, Sid Craig. Jenny, born Genevieve Guidroz, became the face of the brand. It had a powerful hook: portion-controlled frozen meals plus one-on-one coaching. You can see one of . The company grew fast and went public in 1991, but its rapid rise brought regulatory problems, as did its flirtation with fen-phen weight-loss drugs shortly before that combo was linked to serious heart risks and pulled from the market. Still, the brand had a core strength: Jenny Craig herself, a sympathetic mom who had struggled with weight issues. That changed in 1995 when Jenny suffered a jaw injury that left her temporarily unable to speak, prompting her retirement as the company's main spokesperson. Nestlé bought the company for roughly $600 million in 2006 and managed its decline for a time, but in 2023 the Jenny Craig brand declared bankruptcy and was acquired by Wellful—the parent of Nutrisystem. It's now a direct-to-consumer, digital-first service: meals shipped, coaching online, no storefronts. , she and her husband, Sid, who died in 2008, became significant philanthropists. They committed millions to Fresno State University, whose business school was named the Sid Craig School of Business. More recently, in 2022, she pledged $5 million to The National WWII Museum in New Orleans to create the Jenny Craig Institute for the Study of War and Democracy. The National Weather Service [issued a freeze watch](The%20National%20Weather%20Service%20issued%20a%20freeze%20watch%20from%20tonight%20at%209%20p.m.%20until%20Monday%20at%209%20a.m.%20for%20temperatures%20in%20Central%20and%20North%20Texas%20that%20will%20dip%20as%20low%20as%2026%20degrees.) from 9 p.m. tonight to 9 a.m. Monday, with Central and North Texas temperatures expected to drop as low as 26°.

# Sunday, November 9, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1936, the organizational meeting of the [Texas Institute of Letters](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D1y6yAUxfHVoE4awEhIBcVr1Pm1KTV8XCwmmOuBG0vefSbOErKB35nz_7huV5tyKrf_9g6GzohbgaNlIIK6ecwhViwE5wM8QXCQ8QkhbJLLsRei58sWbMqvTXXBOB4W0YERepLTvGguut14Ebm0QamoYvQuzBeuZwdu1JqD83OXzA8mBF-E5OKih1GNUU2z99rD4q1nikNIhHWgHQhO22J-4RPq4PHeZbMTPRq7_GNyZXI9jmOgtlssORUYsN6YXHdbgkP8ZHKFQjVBY3J9U30qjRJ9EfQY-9_frasmPI6Uc2qTZorf7jbl9xr9rdHTyO8AAAD__3Zjfo4) convened in the lecture room of the Hall of State at the Texas Centennial Exposition in Dallas. The institute was created to promote Texas literature and to recognize literary achievements. A new pickleball club featuring open play, tournaments, and other events will open next month in Plano. Get more details about the club [in today's _Around Texas_](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLuu5CAQRL8GZ4ygx4_rwMEmZHfTDS0MzR20bdqC9jz-fjXzCxtWqVQ6On--12-fKZef337HRZ6J14KPRiiCdQ1MMVUugs8Dg2DckPiOMa5gYNDWajOv0Wd6rX0Xl83E2Xa42GmE8WuejO1uywhDnKeQwJg0YJ9GjNt1ul7n0FuLELq8vM-sNbMFY6_TZeiH1I9fIUwB5-CD6g3GLFwvckPBp2-JXnzHegm8d7TcRI6mrr8UOAUu8L6fJcsr74cP8t4ocNET-aYTV9EPrnJT4A7yhXXj85O2s-WCrSlwbx4FzloFzkwKnA-ojxz-Em6eSAc6Ny2sOSWsmg8s-iD_0sJnLX7HIk3nT1dYgevqEo9HJsptnFRvfnaf6cMu_2f8vsC_AAAA___TN5d-). This edition is sponsored by [Oricle, a trusted partner making better hearing possible for thousands of families](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDHv2yAUxD8N3mzBw4YwMPylyFKHtEuldkMYHgkSMRHgOPn2Vdyta7ffe3c6ne7XxVxsTHG9frd31O0Vsllxrwlbw2JcTj6UvDZ8PdA19Aum_ETvDVCYesZ6qoy3Mb3N2Hm9UK9Yh5pJAeKkJGXdTQdhp4VTFYKyo0WgioMDxq2UJ4Bp6aL-hDFGFQPKuBymcQqjODknHSpnHRkp-thyGdoNG75sDemdn1gGl-9d0rfWHpXwLwIzgXnf9-GKLZfoEn4cBObacsHah63EvNUeA-GzwWBasWu1rsW8mugJPxMQ-QDGFAGxHaxG-c_fhnBcwDkBUbeFEX7--Xv-QUB8zd_Of6WuaP_YY0qxCklGer3bmI7O7f-Wfmr4EwAA___vk44d). Sometimes the best stories aren’t crafted in marketing meetings—they unfold around the dinner table. Recently, our founder gifted his dad, “Grandpa Jim,” a pair of Oricle hearing aids. What happened next had the whole family laughing, tearing up, and realizing just how powerful clear hearing can be.

## Texas Braces for First Freeze of Season
The National Weather Service [issued a freeze watch](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkb2O3CAUhZ8Gd1j8eOyhoLCycrdpt7QwXMYo2FhwM55JkWePTB5hq_vB0QF9ul-f86cJMeyPn2YDjS-f5h3OEgER8mxTdD6nHeF1gEVwC8T0BOdmwcSNck6Zmp0J8T13jdMLc4o3oPnQi_6uBsabVSu5WLU45hxjtpPe9q4fnFKquyumeN8EfT3GOVNcMC6H9tbdfNffrR0sKGss6Ri4gCm3uALCyxQf3-kJubVpa6JeEY9C5EjERMR0nmdrl3JZXDkRU60QMV1XREyXFK1WdE8ZV1pz6jPAn7A_KMJ2QDb4O0OhRyolLBHo8qZb2p15118kkeNfIkeEFxL5MRJxE2wKuWClMUL-T19gcIVc-eMq_0je1xOuUOcOZ53FrinFiifAr7bJ2h1niDGUfiAde2wmxGqM39vTU4t_AQAA__-iPqX7) from 9 p.m. tonight to 9 a.m. Monday, with Central and North Texas temperatures expected to drop as low as 26 degrees. The low temperatures come with a cold front moving in this morning, sending temperatures in Central and North Texas today into the 50s. Temperatures will quickly rise back to the 70s on Tuesday and hover between the 70s and 80s for the rest of the week. You can see the National Weather Service's freeze warning, with a map of expected temperatures [here](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykzz2O6yAQAODT4C7WDP4LBcVr3OW1WyI8DDESCREemeT2q90r7AU-6fu6uZtPOT3v__2DrbxjcU9uR2YRro5KDrGWp_D7xSQcNs7l5BCcBj1dEC9gXPApf9zYBbtBMNixxWXW89UsgN1uI0SADSaiiYYtorkiDR4MIxkiCl2yPxgiGNSAw9JP4xTH-Uq0EBvypEbgkKTUXnYWfvsj5k85ufZUHl22u8jrUMM_pVel19Za39jLzrW_l1PpNbag9NpVG14t5ZyOeVEj3B8-5V9B_vY-rf4OAAD__4QgbTI).
## FIFA World Cup 26 Draw Set for December
Fans will have their [chance](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkEGu2yAURVeDZ1hAsLEHDKJ-efbzO6j0h9YzPBJUYiz8apzdV-kWuoF7zznfn_MnxBTX-w2eaOkMeV6x7gmJsMwuJx9KXgnPDR2hXzDlA72flVAdl5KLcfYQ02vWjbeL8KNs0ErTq34YjZDNwyLIxSsvQYFZFuiVMbLX-hLkMA6dVk207zEpxSiVkBfTdroLuh-cMw5HB45pgT5SLi09kPCEPaRXPrC0Lj-bZB9E284uV6YmpqZaawvlrUR5pbO954Op6YZ159dC0SXcmZrel0xNX47ygoWp6Vd0v5F2fsuVXw-ICZaEPOTCP9C1vONfIUQXIfHvXJLnP_5s_KNA5T-h0Ksp1m81phT33jAt7k-I6R8e_V_Uw6q_AQAA__-6PIyV) to be a part of North Texas sports history and get tickets for next year's World Cup matchups, with the official FIFA World Cup 26 Draw date set for Dec. 5. The draw, set to take place at Billy Bob's Texas in Fort Worth, will cost fans $10 for a chance to buy tickets for one of the nine FIFA World Cup 26 matches slated to take place at AT&T Stadium next year. The draw party will feature live music and entertainment, special appearances from soccer personalities, giveaways, and exclusive merchandise. You can find more information and buy tickets for the event [here](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuwyAUAL8Gb7YAgwkDQxdv6drReoHnBJUYC16N8_dV-gudT7qT7uu6XCGmuN0_4YmOzjUvG7aakAjL4nMKa8kb4bmjJww3TPnAEBbJpe6F6LldAsT0WlQX3I0HKzp0wkxyuljDRfdwOoDmRuFkPWhtLBgEtGJErrgYPe-ie8uE4FZILkYzaKVXNV28Nx6tB88UxxApl4EeSHhCXdMrH1gGn59dcg-ivbLxg8mZybm1NsBZ34zJGQ_cqDI5CynGyUom5zWu0LdcUuj9z96HAq3fodCrp-i_kWpXXNhbTCnWyTDF70-I6a9F_zt0OPkbAAD__2VZerQ).
## List: Lubbock Has Best Independent Coffee Shop
A new survey from _USA Today's_ _10BEST_ ranked [Monomyth Coffee in Lubbock](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OqzAUhJ_GdEb2CcZx4eI2dLntlsg_h2DF2AhOQnj7VVbaJ9hmmhmNPn1ft_HmUk7l_t8taOk91bHgsWckwm0MNcdpq4XwvWIgjB5zfWGMIwhQXEouzBhdyufYNdF6EY1s0ErdQ381WshmtgF65SAYAUIbJYQKk9EAyqi-Q69Uk-znTEphJAh50a3q1NT11xB0QBNcYJ3AmKhuLc1I-Hb7lM_6wq0NdWmynYnWnV3-MRgYDMdxtI_g46dkMICAjsEgxSc0g2GppS4nzTzUaULk-el9DQ9e3IKRe9yJpxJxxRKx0O9qn-vKQ30W2k7uT_7cHaca3clgaDYb1yPlnPZes07cF5fyDxv9zejLwncAAAD__73Xisg) the best independent coffee shop in the country. The West Texas coffee shop was praised for its friendly service, tasty pastries and breakfast items, and comfortable space in the ranking. Monomyth Coffee was the only Texas-based shop to make the list. You can see the full list [here](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDuO7CAQRVeDM1tQxh8Cgpc465dOaGGqaCPRxoKa_ux-5NnCxPfqHOl83dabiyke9__uQZbfIa8HvWoiZiqrzwlDyQfT-yTPhBul_CTEFSQMrVKtNCu6mD6rbtBuEo1qyKpphHE2k1TNbnEOFLwb_KRnoN6Mfa9BBgBjthHc1kR7wZSSRoFU_dQNegh6nL2fPBnvvNCSMHIuHe_E9HY1pE9-Uul8fjTJ7sxnFf0_AYuARcmNKnff1XFG97k-Ahb3cgWrgOUa23ggnXQgHdz6HAJRW_d8CliaYvF8xZRiHSeh5f3hYvr18N_qPC38BAAA__9DwXpo).
| _Flying together with our sponsor_ [](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGP4yAQhX8N7mIxYIMpKCJFlq7IXXPSXYcIDAkSMRGejZN_v0q223a7b-Y9PT29f0d39Lnk5fzbX9HSI1W34LYWJMLmQi0xtboQPm4YCOMJS71jjE5wMe4Adty46HN5uqGL9sSjgQ4taCXUZDSH7mJBpkmFFIyGMUodkpiMSlp6pYZJj7LL9hUGwA0IDlL34zCmQU0h6IAm-MAGjjFTbT1dkPDh11Se9Y6tD_XaFXshuq1M7pmYmZi3bevPSLXlUPDleL3l7DA5an5ZfaBcF5cjkwcmVH0DgPnGPqX3JaRkQq0fJ2Dy8Pf__IcJtZ9_Hb6krtl423IpeVWaDfx89bm8a9HPxrxb8RkAAP__hs6EAw) When our founder gave his dad, “Grandpa Jim,” [a pair of Oricle hearing aids](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDHv2yAUxD8N3mzBw4YwMPylyFKHtEuldkMYHgkSMRHgOPn2Vdyta7ffe3c6ne7XxVxsTHG9frd31O0Vsllxrwlbw2JcTj6UvDZ8PdA19Aum_ETvDVCYesZ6qoy3Mb3N2Hm9UK9Yh5pJAeKkJGXdTQdhp4VTFYKyo0WgioMDxq2UJ4Bp6aL-hDFGFQPKuBymcQqjODknHSpnHRkp-thyGdoNG75sDemdn1gGl-9d0rfWHpXwLwIzgXnf9-GKLZfoEn4cBObacsHah63EvNUeA-GzwWBasWu1rsW8mugJPxMQ-QDGFAGxHaxG-c_fhnBcwDkBUbeFEX7--Xv-QUB8zd_Of6WuaP_YY0qxCklGer3bmI7O7f-Wfmr4EwAA___vk44d), nobody knew what to expect. For years, Jim had struggled to keep up with conversations—missing jokes, nodding along, and quietly withdrawing. But the moment he put them on, everything changed. Suddenly, voices were crisp, laughter rang out, and Jim was back in the middle of it all. At one point, he even asked the family to “quiet down” because things were suddenly _too clear._ That moment stuck with us. For Jim, it wasn’t just about hearing better—it was about feeling present again. He loved them so much, he immediately asked for an extra pair, just in case. [Stories like this are why we’re proud to partner with Oricle.](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDHv2yAUxD8N3mzBw4YwMPylyFKHtEuldkMYHgkSMRHgOPn2Vdyta7ffe3c6ne7XxVxsTHG9frd31O0Vsllxrwlbw2JcTj6UvDZ8PdA19Aum_ETvDVCYesZ6qoy3Mb3N2Hm9UK9Yh5pJAeKkJGXdTQdhp4VTFYKyo0WgioMDxq2UJ4Bp6aL-hDFGFQPKuBymcQqjODknHSpnHRkp-thyGdoNG75sDemdn1gGl-9d0rfWHpXwLwIzgXnf9-GKLZfoEn4cBObacsHah63EvNUeA-GzwWBasWu1rsW8mugJPxMQ-QDGFAGxHaxG-c_fhnBcwDkBUbeFEX7--Xv-QUB8zd_Of6WuaP_YY0qxCklGer3bmI7O7f-Wfmr4EwAA___vk44d) If you or someone you love has been waiting to take the step toward better hearing, now’s the time. Don’t miss out on life’s moments—[see what Oricle can do for you today](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDHv2yAUxD8N3mzBw4YwMPylyFKHtEuldkMYHgkSMRHgOPn2Vdyta7ffe3c6ne7XxVxsTHG9frd31O0Vsllxrwlbw2JcTj6UvDZ8PdA19Aum_ETvDVCYesZ6qoy3Mb3N2Hm9UK9Yh5pJAeKkJGXdTQdhp4VTFYKyo0WgioMDxq2UJ4Bp6aL-hDFGFQPKuBymcQqjODknHSpnHRkp-thyGdoNG75sDemdn1gGl-9d0rfWHpXwLwIzgXnf9-GKLZfoEn4cBObacsHah63EvNUeA-GzwWBasWu1rsW8mugJPxMQ-QDGFAGxHaxG-c_fhnBcwDkBUbeFEX7--Xv-QUB8zd_Of6WuaP_YY0qxCklGer3bmI7O7f-Wfmr4EwAA___vk44d).

Suddenly, voices were crisp, laughter rang out, and Jim was back in the middle of it all. At one point, he even asked the family to “quiet down” because things were suddenly too clear. That moment stuck with us. For Jim, it wasn’t just about hearing better—it was about feeling present again. He loved them so much, he immediately asked for an extra pair, just in case. name: Massachusetts Democratic Party
subject: Trump Truth: Tariff Turmoil and ICE Raids Hit Working Families
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Logo.png]
Hello Peter,
Donald Trump’s campaign promise was that he would lower grocery prices “on day one.” Instead, he’s raised costs, shaken small businesses, and unleashed fear in workplaces across the country. Election Day 2025 was a resounding response to his failures.
Voters Are Paying Attention
On Tuesday, voters from coast to coast cast their ballots for the Democratic message: affordability, availability, accessibility.
In the New Jersey and Virginia governor’s races, Mikie Sherrill and Abigail Spanberger emphasized the economic challenges confronting residents – particularly in Virginia, where the long-term government shutdown has continued to cause real harm.
Governor Maura Healey , commenting on the two gubernatorial victories, said:
“By electing Mikie Sherill and Abigail Spanberger, voters proved that they want strong Democratic leaders who are going to tackle affordability. Both of these exceptional women are going to get to work every single day to put people first, lower costs, and make people’s lives easier.”
At a press briefing evaluating the results of the November 4th elections, which produced Democratic wins across the country, Democratic National Committee Chair Ken Martin underscored that “affordability” was the defining message and that the Party will focus on an economic agenda centered on lowering costs for working families.
Democratic Governors Association Executive Director Meghan Meehan-Draper echoed that message, promising that Democrats will be “laser-focused” on affordability and availability.
Economic Reality Under Trump
Basic household prices continue to rise. According to the Bureau of Labor Statistics, the cost of living increased by about 3.3% in Massachusetts.
The Commonwealth Beacon reported on November 3rd, 2025, that Massachusetts’ unemployment rate has climbed to 4.8%, half a percentage point higher than the national average.
Trump’s tariffs have imposed additional supply-side costs on small businesses. On a WGBH program, the owner of a small, family-owned fabric store, which relies on imported materials from China, India, and Indonesia, described how rising tariffs are driving up prices for both businesses and consumers.
Across the small business community, the impacts are widespread:
* Candy Stores face steep tariffs on chocolate imports.
* Restaurants are struggling to afford food and supplies.
* Toy stores and specialty shops are being squeezed by higher costs and shrinking margins.
The economic future is increasingly grim for small, independent businesses across the country.
Meanwhile, according to an article in the Commonwealth Beacon , the Associated Industries of Massachusetts reported that the federal shutdown and Trump’s tariffs are undermining business confidence.
Read More Here [https://commonwealthbeacon.org/economy/survey-mass-business-confidence-stuck-in-longest-rut-since-pandemic/]
Adding Fear to Financial Pain
At the same time, small businesses, already challenged by higher supply costs, are being forced to lay off workers. Higher prices are forcing families to scale back purchases and restaurant dining.
And in communities across Massachusetts, workers face a new layer of fear and instability: ICE raids .
As reported by Boston.com [https://www.boston.com/news/local-news/2025/11/04/this-is-kidnapping-plain-and-simple-ice-arrests-9-employees-in-raid-at-allston-car-wash/] , a recent raid on a car wash in Allston led to the detention of nine workers. Similar raids have targeted landscaping companies, restaurants, and construction sites, disrupting local economies and tearing communities apart.
Boston.com [https://www.boston.com/news/local-news/2025/11/04/this-is-kidnapping-plain-and-simple-ice-arrests-9-employees-in-raid-at-allston-car-wash/]
Tariffs Are Taxes, and Trump's Are Unconstitutional
On Wednesday, November 5th, the United States Supreme Court heard challenges to Donald Trump’s arbitrary tariff policies. Representing a coalition of businesses, Neal Katyal argued that the president has overstepped powers that belong exclusively to Congress.
Mr. Katyal reminded the Court that tariffs are, in essence, taxes — and under the Constitution, only Congress has the authority to set them. While the president may impose tariffs in limited, emergency circumstances, none of those conditions exist today.
Trump’s trade agenda doesn’t just raise costs for families; it violates the balance of power enshrined in our Constitution.

clean_body: [] Hello Peter, Donald Trump’s campaign promise was that he would lower grocery prices “on day one.” Instead, he’s raised costs, shaken small businesses, and unleashed fear in workplaces across the country. Election Day 2025 was a resounding response to his failures. Voters Are Paying Attention On Tuesday, voters from coast to coast cast their ballots for the Democratic message: affordability, availability, accessibility. In the New Jersey and Virginia governor’s races, Mikie Sherrill and Abigail Spanberger emphasized the economic challenges confronting residents – particularly in Virginia, where the long-term government shutdown has continued to cause real harm. Governor Maura Healey , commenting on the two gubernatorial victories, said: “By electing Mikie Sherill and Abigail Spanberger, voters proved that they want strong Democratic leaders who are going to tackle affordability. Both of these exceptional women are going to get to work every single day to put people first, lower costs, and make people’s lives easier.” At a press briefing evaluating the results of the November 4th elections, which produced Democratic wins across the country, Democratic National Committee Chair Ken Martin underscored that “affordability” was the defining message and that the Party will focus on an economic agenda centered on lowering costs for working families. Democratic Governors Association Executive Director Meghan Meehan-Draper echoed that message, promising that Democrats will be “laser-focused” on affordability and availability. Economic Reality Under Trump Basic household prices continue to rise. According to the Bureau of Labor Statistics, the cost of living increased by about 3.3% in Massachusetts. The Commonwealth Beacon reported on November 3rd, 2025, that Massachusetts’ unemployment rate has climbed to 4.8%, half a percentage point higher than the national average. Trump’s tariffs have imposed additional supply-side costs on small businesses. On a WGBH program, the owner of a small, family-owned fabric store, which relies on imported materials from China, India, and Indonesia, described how rising tariffs are driving up prices for both businesses and consumers. Across the small business community, the impacts are widespread: Candy Stores face steep tariffs on chocolate imports. Restaurants are struggling to afford food and supplies. * Toy stores and specialty shops are being squeezed by higher costs and shrinking margins. The economic future is increasingly grim for small, independent businesses across the country. Meanwhile, according to an article in the Commonwealth Beacon , the Associated Industries of Massachusetts reported that the federal shutdown and Trump’s tariffs are undermining business confidence. Read More Here [] Adding Fear to Financial Pain At the same time, small businesses, already challenged by higher supply costs, are being forced to lay off workers. Higher prices are forcing families to scale back purchases and restaurant dining. And in communities across Massachusetts, workers face a new layer of fear and instability: ICE raids . As reported by Boston.com [] , a recent raid on a car wash in Allston led to the detention of nine workers. Similar raids have targeted landscaping companies, restaurants, and construction sites, disrupting local economies and tearing communities apart. While the president may impose tariffs in limited, emergency circumstances, none of those conditions exist today. subject: The whole ballgame
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Peter, it is Sunday, November 9th, and here is the situation in Georgia’s critical U.S. Senate race:
Trump’s MAGA allies have already spent massive sums of money to defeat Jon Ossoff because they know if they win this race in Georgia, they can lock in Senate control for the GOP and get rid of one of the strongest anti-corruption voices in the Senate.
_Obviously, we can’t let that happen, Peter._
But right now, we have been outspent in a big way. The GOP and their Super PACs have already spent more than $10 million on this race, and we need your help to fight back.
**[Please, use this link to give $5 or whatever you can to Jon’s reelection campaign today.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-nov25.fw0_9v&refcode=em251109-1-subs-a&t=1&akid=1055%2E5691347%2EY9XC4n)
Peter, the only way out of this downward spiral is to win in the midterm elections.
_That’s the whole ballgame._
And this Senate race in Georgia is the most important and competitive in the country.
**So please. This is something you can do _right now_ that makes a real difference. **
**[Use this link to donate to Jon Ossoff’s reelection campaign in Georgia. We wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t so important.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-nov25.fw0_9v&refcode=em251109-1-subs-a&t=2&akid=1055%2E5691347%2EY9XC4n)

subject: Trump REALLY wants his name on this new NFL stadium. So let's name it after Obama. :D
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Urge Washington Commanders to name new stadium after Obama, NOT Trump](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6a01f9c3-de0a-40eb-9023-15d7bd55d0d5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T58a69fc6-f7fa-48fd-92a2-1745ef368956/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | _([Take action](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5f46ccfd-5297-490e-90f5-18a283c3292f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), then forward this to others to help build momentum!) _ The Washington Commanders football team is building a brand new stadium in DC, and it promises to be spectacular. And apparently Trump [REALLY wants ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T17a19d87-1837-4b93-b035-00e213304d29/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)it to be named after him, and Trump officials have been pushing the team's owners hard to make it happen. [**Which is why we absolutely must name it "Barack Obama Stadium."**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te97b222c-9c90-44cf-a078-b1dfff324377/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) It makes a whole lot more sense. It's a DC team, and Obama won 90% of the DC vote in his elections, while Trump took 10%. DC hates Trump, just like most of Earth. We could still honor Trump appropriately, perhaps by putting his picture on all the bathroom urinal cakes. But there's no way in hell his name should be on that stadium. [**Add your name: Urge the Washington Commanders to name their new stadium after Obama, NOT Trump**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7f2b431b-0a70-4ae9-a893-318bf3f33c61/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Moments like these shape lives, Peter. At last year's conference, a cadet from Texas A&M called the experience of lunch with WWII heroes "_truly inspirational -- something I will never forget._" At nearly every meal, young cadets will sit side-by-side with World War II heroes, listening to stories of Normandy, Iwo Jima, and the Chosin Reservoir - _thanks to you._ At the evening reception, post-9/11 veterans will raise a glass in fellowship - _thanks to you, Peter._

Peter, A small gift from you creates a big memory for both sides. When a cadet hears about D-Day directly from the man who landed there, _history becomes real_. When a Vietnam hero raises a glass at our reception this Friday, _he knows he's not forgotten_.
