name: Roy Cooper
subject: America’s farmers can’t catch a break
body:
This is not acceptable.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1898?t=1&akid=39%2E124072%2EqAHHKj)
Peter — thanks to President Trump’s senseless tariff policy and trade wars, farmers here in North Carolina and across the nation are dealing with insecurity, instability, rising costs, and more. _They can’t catch a break._ This week, I met with a group of North Carolina farmers who are some of the hardest hit by the GOP’s extreme policies. They talked with me about their frustrations and concerns if the President and the Republican Senate and House allow this to continue. [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1924?t=6&akid=39%2E124072%2EqAHHKj) When you send me to the U.S. Senate, I will stand up to the Trump Administration, Peter. I will work to get this country back on track for America’s farmers, working families, and everyone who’s being torn down by the GOP’s billionaire-first policy. **[If you’re ready to get this country back on track, I’m personally asking you to chip in to support our campaign. I’m ready to deliver for this country as the next Democratic U.S. Senator, and I can’t do it alone. Click here to give.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1924?t=7&akid=39%2E124072%2EqAHHKj)** | [DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1924?t=8&akid=39%2E124072%2EqAHHKj)
---
Thanks so much,
Roy Cooper
[](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1924?t=9&akid=39%2E124072%2EqAHHKj)
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=2&akid=39%2E124072%2EqAHHKj)**
[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=3&akid=39%2E124072%2EqAHHKj)
---
[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1915?t=4&akid=39%2E124072%2EqAHHKj)
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=5&akid=39%2E124072%2EqAHHKj)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=39%2E124072%2EqAHHKj)
If you wish to receive fewer messages from us, [submit this form to let us know.](https://act.roycooper.com/signup/i-want-less-emails-cooper-north-carolina/?t=10&akid=39%2E124072%2EqAHHKj)

subject: Duty calls – again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elise for Governor
body:
\- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
| [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4fe5707ab6004fada1644b4258e4a188&_e=mWbzpEkyKCck3ImSv9OOpUwe67pB6g1f0nIolBkun7Oq3C60gzuUljEPVeve_mN1CtUsuHtUMUIaUdGiuMNitnWBO-uCOaFu71okP3ycuczPCX6Zfc9-XjAi_UJnzQCyWJw7xfYfAu6vHQ9grZSKnZuMbp99HwF-qfYL4mJCYHdxuP-kQgMEE9vQzyFk623bblefI_DRq0cWyaQ7YaLugyR6ddLENC2IT6leoT0JBFWD_IKk-ffWQyEW_vPQj4D9rV1fuC3giD0mIEGENCEGtxoV0CixvqpDBRqLmxEQ2Azf6Ejrs9XvRqmtqQlHPbUxbKgWNMB0zSkNfUaDrD2AghWnTI5w82ieQY9TT_hz7P-X64XvGSerUQOZHPZhwwIBcOuXcJtUO9qGwgtOXADlkJHMyCPeOmy8iJTh5wwFgZgYr5BjOHgkkIkqI5PwGkZsAujnlvmliaIaGIrP01uXRJeV0FvHAGuU0WrGVhs9ngl3l65jpRi2dQV2P5vNP7Buw7gA6PLgpkUiOW3RNT_CU5fXHa1OhudhUkuvTcVKfSgGkFbzvI0aR4STMiqMyFcJ_FZJj3GpkdSTNm1xlkq4ERTYtBOIHR4Xjn1fevXncL8JRrCfbGuzTX6Ugm47O3w4tmXwECQnY4mkzG30B0orpA%3D%3D)
---
Patriot,
---
When I learned that leaving Congress to become U.N. Ambassador could cost us our House Majority, I made the only choice my conscience allowed: _stay and fight for America in the People’s House_.
---
Now that a jihadi Communist has been elected Mayor of New York City, _duty calls once again_.
---
**I am officially running for Governor to SAVE New York and stop the spread of communism before it consumes the entire nation.**
---
_Few know this, but Zohran Mamdani had a secret weapon that powered his win..._
---
...He was able to unlock over _**$11 MILLION** in MATCHING FUNDS_.
---
**Well, this is my solemn promise to you: We will harness that same secret weapon and unlock the _LEGAL_ _MAXIMUM_ amount of matching funds to win this race.**
---
_It is a real, authentic, certified match – at 600%! No games. No gimmicks._
---

body:
Election Day is the finish line of this race – it’s what we do now that will determine whether we win or lose.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=5588%2E400544%2E4-zJb6)
I’m emailing to ask you to **[please make your first-ever $5 contribution to our grassroots campaign for New Mexico. Your support will make a powerful difference.](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251109_1_marathon.vqlimJ&amount=5&refcode=em20251109-5588&t=2&akid=5588%2E400544%2E4-zJb6)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251109_1_marathon.vqlimJ&amount=5&refcode=em20251109-5588&t=3&akid=5588%2E400544%2E4-zJb6)**
First, I hope you’ll let me share a personal note about this race, and how it reminds me of the other running I’ve done: marathons and other road races across the country.
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251109_1_marathon.vqlimJ&amount=5&refcode=em20251109-5588&t=4&akid=5588%2E400544%2E4-zJb6)_When I ran the Boston Marathon in ‘21, my feet pounded the ancestral homelands of the Massachusett, the Mashpee Wampanoag, and the Pawtucket people._
I love running. It’s a way that I honor my ancestors, those who serve our country, and the landscapes that sustain us. It strengthens my spirit, and it’s one of the many things that have made me fierce.
In the 20 years since I started running, I’ve learned many lessons — some more literal than others. Good shoes matter. You fuel for mile seven at mile two. You must treat a marathon or an ultramarathon as what it is: 26 (or more!) miles.
You must be prepared, take things slow, and put in the work well ahead of the race. Runners often say that the training cycle is the marathon, and race day is just the celebration of your preparation — and I believe that!
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251109_1_marathon.vqlimJ&amount=5&refcode=em20251109-5588&t=5&akid=5588%2E400544%2E4-zJb6)_I run because my ancestors gave me this ability._
I know you see where I’m going with this. Running has taught me that winning will require endurance, preparation, and strength. **The work we do together right now will be the defining factor in whether we’re prepared to defeat the MAGA forces already hard at work trying to flip New Mexico red next year.** It’s why I knew we had to launch our campaign early, and why I’m relying on continued support from dedicated supporters like you to build a campaign strong enough to overcome the immense challenges that lie ahead. _And now, we are officially less than a year out._
[**Winning this race isn’t something I can do without you. Will you donate $5 to power our campaign? Election Day is just the finish line of this race – it’s what we do today that will determine whether we win or lose.**](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251109_1_marathon.vqlimJ&amount=5&refcode=em20251109-5588&t=6&akid=5588%2E400544%2E4-zJb6)
Since my first marathon, I’ve never stopped running. I run races to honor people who serve our country, like the Army Ten-Miler and Marine Corps Marathon. I run to see beautiful landscapes, like the mesas in the 34-mile ultramarathon in Canyon de Chelly National Monument in Arizona.
**Running has taught me what it means to be fierce, and that the things worth fighting for are worth working hard for.** Progress is earned through perseverance. It is realized by facing challenges head-on, whether it’s in a race that carries me many miles on my feet, or a run for Congress, or running an entire department as the United States Secretary of the Interior.
**I’m running for governor to change the game for New Mexico.[I would be humbled to receive your support in the form of $5 donation, especially today, when it will make the biggest impact.](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251109_1_marathon.vqlimJ&amount=5&refcode=em20251109-5588&t=7&akid=5588%2E400544%2E4-zJb6)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251109_1_marathon.vqlimJ&amount=5&refcode=em20251109-5588&t=26&akid=5588%2E400544%2E4-zJb6)**
With your support, I know we will cross that finish line together 💛
Deb
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20251109-1&t=27&refcode2=5588_400544_4-zJb6&akid=5588%2E400544%2E4-zJb6)**
[](https://deb4gov.us/text-me)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=28&akid=5588%2E400544%2E4-zJb6)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=29&akid=5588%2E400544%2E4-zJb6)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
clean_body: Election Day is the finish line of this race – it’s what we do now that will determine whether we win or lose. I’m emailing to ask you to First, I hope you’ll let me share a personal note about this race, and how it reminds me of the other running I’ve done: marathons and other road races across the country. I ran the Boston Marathon in ‘21, my feet pounded the ancestral homelands of the Massachusett, the Mashpee Wampanoag, and the Pawtucket people. I love running. It’s a way that I honor my ancestors, those who serve our country, and the landscapes that sustain us. It strengthens my spirit, and it’s one of the many things that have made me fierce. In the 20 years since I started running, I’ve learned many lessons — some more literal than others. Good shoes matter. You fuel for mile seven at mile two. You must treat a marathon or an ultramarathon as what it is: 26 (or more!) miles. You must be prepared, take things slow, and put in the work well ahead of the race. Runners often say that the training cycle is the marathon, and race day is just the celebration of your preparation — and I believe that! run because my ancestors gave me this ability. I know you see where I’m going with this. Running has taught me that winning will require endurance, preparation, and strength. The work we do together right now will be the defining factor in whether we’re prepared to defeat the MAGA forces already hard at work trying to flip New Mexico red next year. It’s why I knew we had to launch our campaign early, and why I’m relying on continued support from dedicated supporters like you to build a campaign strong enough to overcome the immense challenges that lie ahead. And now, we are officially less than a year out. Since my first marathon, I’ve never stopped running. I run races to honor people who serve our country, like the Army Ten-Miler and Marine Corps Marathon. I run to see beautiful landscapes, like the mesas in the 34-mile ultramarathon in Canyon de Chelly National Monument in Arizona. Running has taught me what it means to be fierce, and that the things worth fighting for are worth working hard for. Progress is earned through perseverance. It is realized by facing challenges head-on, whether it’s in a race that carries me many miles on my feet, or a run for Congress, or running an entire department as the United States Secretary of the Interior. I’m running for governor to change the game for New Mexico. With your support, I know we will cross that finish line together 💛 Deb

name: =?utf-8?q?Missing_Signature_=E2=9D=97=5Bprotectvoting=2Eorg=5D?=
subject: FORWARD: Thank Justice Sotomayor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
You’re about to lose your signature spot!
| Trump’s Supreme Court majority is on the verge of DESTROYING the Voting Rights Act!

**Sonia Sotomayor is one of our ONLY fighters for democracy left on the Court, but you still haven’t signed our letter thanking her for her work.** [**We’re giving you ONE more chance to sign by 8am tomorrow, or you will lose your signature spot. THANK JUSTICE SOTOMAYOR NOW »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96341?t=6&akid=21795%2E878179%2ET1AgUl) | [**Donate $3 to sign the letter now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96341?t=7&akid=21795%2E878179%2ET1AgUl)
---
Thank you,

_The Voter Protection Project_
**–BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE–**
_Justice Sotomayor just put the MAGA SCOTUS majority & Donald Trump to SHAME:_
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96341?t=8&akid=21795%2E878179%2ET1AgUl)
**If a member of the Supreme Court — _who is supposed to be impartial_ — is sounding the alarm, _we should ALL be listening._**

Team, we’re so grateful for Sotomayor’s BRAVE leadership — but Republicans are FURIOUS with Sotomayor, and they’re _plotting revenge._

We need to show Supreme Court Justice Sotomayor that Democrats (especially Democrats in your state) have her back!

[**As one of the FEW protectors of our democracy left on the Supreme Court, we’re sending Sotomayor a letter thanking her for her incredible work. WE HAVE ONLY 18 SPOTS LEFT:**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96341?t=9&akid=21795%2E878179%2ET1AgUl)
[**Donate $3 to sign the letter now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96341?t=10&akid=21795%2E878179%2ET1AgUl)
---
TO: Justice Sonia Sotomayor
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: Thank you for taking a stand. **Dear Justice Sotomayor,

Thank you for standing up for our democracy against Donald Trump’s authoritarian agenda and blatant disregard of the Constitution.**

Your bravery continues to blow us away, time after time.

**As Trump tries to seize more and more control from Congress and the courts, your resilience is needed now more than ever.**

I’m sick and tired of the GOP letting him off scot-free — so I’m doing everything in my power to elect Democrats and ensure we appoint more amazing Supreme Court Justices like YOU in the near future.

[**I know you’re facing relentless attacks from Trump and his MAGA minions, so I’m signing this thank you letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to help Democrats keep fighting for justice »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96341?t=11&akid=21795%2E878179%2ET1AgUl) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96341?t=12&akid=21795%2E878179%2ET1AgUl) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96341?t=13&akid=21795%2E878179%2ET1AgUl)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
—The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21795%2E878179%2ET1AgUl). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21795%2E878179%2ET1AgUl).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=21795%2E878179%2ET1AgUl) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=21795%2E878179%2ET1AgUl). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=21795%2E878179%2ET1AgUl)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=21795%2E878179%2ET1AgUl)

name: 2026 via Our Revolution
subject: Maine’s dark money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34620?t=1011&refcode=email-20251109_v&akid=9805%2E5885482%2EFNzx76 ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

To have a shot at stopping Trump, we *must* start by taking control of
Congress in the midterms – and that all starts with flipping Susan
Collins’s Senate seat blue in 2026.

But corporate checks and dark money are already FLOODING into Maine as we
speak, trying to buy votes and drown out the voices of the working class.
A pro-Collins super PAC raised **$5.6 MILLION** in the first half of 2025
alone.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34621?source=email-20251109&t=1060&akid=9805%2E5885482%2EFNzx76 ]Headline: Scoop: Pro-Collins super PAC raised $5.6 million in first
half of 2025

That’s why Our Revolution is going all in on Maine – organizing
volunteers, training new leaders, and covering the state with people
power. And we’re working alongside Senate candidate Graham Platner, who’s
ready to take on Collins with a bold, unapologetically progressive
campaign to do it.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34620?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20251109nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9805%2E5885482%2EFNzx76 ]Will you chip in $10 now to help us build our grassroots army to defeat
Susan Collins, take back the Senate, and regain the power to actually stop
Trump?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34620?t=1042&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20251109nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9805%2E5885482%2EFNzx76 ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34620?t=1043&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20251109nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9805%2E5885482%2EFNzx76 ]CHIP IN $22

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34620?t=1047&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20251109nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9805%2E5885482%2EFNzx76 ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34620?t=1048&amount=9&refcode=email-20251109nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9805%2E5885482%2EFNzx76 ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

The $5.6 million the rightwing has dumped into Maine is just the opening
salvo. Democrat Jared Golden just announced he won’t seek re-election to
the House next year, giving Republicans a KEY opportunity to pick up a
seat if we don’t step up.

That’s why Our Revolution is already ramping up our grassroots ground game
in key strategic districts. Because time and time again, we’ve proven that
when we turn out our movement in force, we *win* tough races. We shatter
corporate influence and flip the seats that matter.

But here’s the thing: we don’t take corporate PAC money – never have,
never will. All of our work is made possible by grassroots supporters like
you.

On Monday, on our LIVE 2026 Kickoff Call with Graham Platner and
powerhouse candidates for Congress, you’ll hear exactly how we’ll mobilize
to grow our movement in states like Maine, Illinois, Missouri, and other
battlegrounds to victory.

The other side knows what’s at stake – and that’s why they’re striking
early. They’re laying their groundwork for 2026 NOW. So are we. But we can
only match their resources and launch the grassroots surge needed in Maine
and our other battleground states with your help.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34620?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20251109nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9805%2E5885482%2EFNzx76 ]Our Revolution is mobilizing like never before – and to win, the
organizing has to start NOW. Please, donate today and help us deliver a
people-powered victory in Maine in 2026 and take back power in Congress.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

name: Wes Moore
subject: What we’re proving together
body:
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=897%2E1086043%2EwMVwST)
[](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251109-1.tiWmuI&refcode=em-20251109-1&t=4&akid=897%2E1086043%2EwMVwST)
Peter, there’s more work to do in the fight for Maryland -- **so I’m proud to be running for reelection.**
Together, we’re proving that Maryland is a state that breaks boundaries and pushes for progress. We’re governing in a way that puts people first. But between the Trump administration’s attacks and the federal government shutdown, we have an uphill battle ahead of us.
Being a leader means staying the course when the going gets tough. To win this fight, I’ll need you by my side, Peter.
**[Will you chip into our campaign today to prove that we will continue to fight for Maryland?](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251109-1.tiWmuI&refcode=em-20251109-1&t=5&akid=897%2E1086043%2EwMVwST)**
Trump and Republicans are trying to erase the progress that we have made. With the government closed and so many federal workers impacted, we have to continue being creative in making this state work for Marylanders.
We already have Republican opponents who want to stop that work -- and more could join the race, including former governor Larry Hogan. That’s why I have to ask:
**[Please, join our movement by making a contribution today. It will directly power our reelection campaign.](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251109-1.tiWmuI&refcode=em-20251109-1&t=6&akid=897%2E1086043%2EwMVwST)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251109-1.tiWmuI&amount=5&refcode=em-20251109-1&t=25&akid=897%2E1086043%2EwMVwST)**
Thank you for all that you do.
Elevate,
Wes

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20251109-1&t=26&refcode2=897_1086043_wMVwST&akid=897%2E1086043%2EwMVwST)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=27&akid=897%2E1086043%2EwMVwST)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=897%2E1086043%2EwMVwST)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

name: Tim Holbert, American Veterans Center
subject: $10 = A beer for a hero
body:

At this year's 28th annual **American Valor Conference** in November, veterans from World War II, Korea, Vietnam, and the War on Terror will gather in Washington, D.C. to share their stories with the next generation of cadets and midshipmen. During the conference our heroes will gather for a special evening reception. After a day of powerful storytelling, they'll have the chance to relax, reconnect, and raise a glass in camaraderie. **And you can be the one who makes that toast possible.** **[Friend, with a gift of just $10, you can buy a veteran a beer ... or give $25, $50, or more to raise a glass with many more heroes.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=6013239f6e1448689571052389a7674e&_e=nmSOZznbO1P5Rsd5XopnPWBSt6DXtWlwHTVckxKvcQhaxyDgOhl-gREXc2al_3py4K2ieHyUMzmJARpSxjKQrrBWgtxRP6D7gB9fqTBhxZFRD9Q94bzPIe6lRPiVSVUGhmbHrJXwZekG-c9qiGCGwx1Os91zXlB6NFh-9fiIchwseYBjlX6CAYp3UaabQV31fQWv6JfCmn2-J2dOHDI5Caxsoa0AehZ_C6cCJQCefTH3W3t-b9M_FvzTsLn9FNnHGk_OOMWtIPNyG805IoNacCIYSGHj4n2dHLYtEi38iuKJP2fJ5rB80UAcmQq_Ss5jzeANndpnMVHUXljMrVaGCdEfEdGa34ZxMU9T1vdAUsueHXP99PMptx-40JNsxlkiEQUxFkCJqFHDUWwHzfkOspkjqKCRTAYAWO6ysTa_Hc8UYUjkuRq1L8ZRkHAsOpYoWEU_5QRStxbCAgo136UZvOtbzkqjimN4a2pHv9SatZx0KghdmEBVSk0iylulMLjbSQhKtxl89Ht1lJQ9jsG2JZDaqr06Prq_TDDjA1hU76mteRldGhvcpPfQEIO-ks7fKOpwArPNFPLGmzNAj_qvmqrT-4AFENVZWpYMp6oaW4egEC6DEZy5l0PF34xQLmcLh3yRbeANYlhCxZ9QRgoyXN16HJ5Iqx4vpyW84Pbh_lL13aQETv_PyqKVmmZThLGQWz7qC4sOfV8d9FkGeP6-6R81mpqFhZup34S1r4aXoi0_WVWM6Rbcb5F8NfB18TSPAjS9r48npQcNVn9niqfdJT9cit3SyvYBa2b3AgOwXS5Y_PIF8Zv_7rK1rVQJPzPW_IXPTqqyAXKT8pq8zkJCAw%3D%3D)**

The American Veterans Center (AVC) preserves and promotes the legacy of America's veterans -- from the Greatest Generation to today's warriors. Through oral histories, educational initiatives, and hosting the National Memorial Day Parade and our annual American Valor Conference and televised gala, **AVC ensures veterans ' stories are remembered and passed down and their legacies of service and sacrifice are never forgotten.**

The American Valor Conference is where America's heroes gather to share their stories with one another and the next generation of military leaders. Through panels, keynotes, and our nationally televised gala _American Valor: A Salute to Our Heroes_ , the conference preserves stories of sacrifice while inspiring tomorrow's leaders. When you give, you're buying a beer, yes -- but you're joining a mission that connects Americans to their heroes in ways both symbolic and unforgettable. **Friend, this simple gesture carries enormous meaning.** A cold beer at the end of the day becomes a toast to freedom, service, and sacrifice. _And your gift makes it possible._ **[Please, Friend, make your most generous gift today to buy a beer or for a veteran who deserves to know they are not forgotten.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=6013239f6e1448689571052389a7674e&_e=nmSOZznbO1P5Rsd5XopnPWBSt6DXtWlwHTVckxKvcQhaxyDgOhl-gREXc2al_3py4K2ieHyUMzmJARpSxjKQrrBWgtxRP6D7gB9fqTBhxZFRD9Q94bzPIe6lRPiVSVUGhmbHrJXwZekG-c9qiGCGwx1Os91zXlB6NFh-9fiIchwseYBjlX6CAYp3UaabQV31fQWv6JfCmn2-J2dOHDI5Caxsoa0AehZ_C6cCJQCefTH3W3t-b9M_FvzTsLn9FNnHGk_OOMWtIPNyG805IoNacCIYSGHj4n2dHLYtEi38iuKJP2fJ5rB80UAcmQq_Ss5jcjKa2aYx42AP2Fq3wv8e1fP74yBva_5-IPjcY0PBySjW_lhcNOVJ_et-0IbW1aFxzS_svR37xBCDW_4Zaqn3LZbduR5XjjkZdB-oiWPRliBfKfCWfDIhF3onvHjE8zY-LXftl75ZE7jebrJs4x8bo0YEUqPvTgFAmTrGOKqsSXLF4H3XWkr6oB8Kmdg-NA49mzaYoUeKtkoaCVpATzOGnCEIC2hjEv4Qzy0zoEXNZODg5JZTBYGpPlLGO0a5pRWRnnTGo7lglr8uXm6bjjAKR-B0YCBNEDAlwUIbs458dCguUk7l0YfVKlE166MTx9ugp0-5A4WOPZk5YqcZFjBKUqSXruuljPzN07F5VEYy7GwN1d8zdxd5YAdUMqp9UVgkzyj9E0s2besHx8y0py0z1l8J5wmUuQdAfAodZRP4uWG1wli1DiPycrCNGxLu8vnvZNIQ2B8Wt1JB8UwcbBI2o8TqCOb8wS-nxHD1aop5xK0FDmI8wJnQah7pPMhkfDlTyf_EzYfZX2IWmgRvSl0ATQ%3D%3D)** Of course, if you'd like to go further, you can also sponsor a meal for a veteran -- $50 for one meal, $100 for two, $250 for a table.

Moments like these shape lives, Friend. At last year's conference, a cadet from Texas A&M called the experience of sharing a pint with WWII heroes "_truly inspirational -- something I will never forget._" At nearly every meal, young cadets will sit side-by-side with World War II heroes, listening to stories of Normandy, Iwo Jima, and the Chosin Reservoir - _thanks to you. _ At the evening reception, post-9/11 veterans will raise a glass in fellowship - _thanks to you._ **These simple moments carry a profound message: America remembers, honors, and thanks her veterans - and inspires the next generation to follow in their footsteps.** **[Please, Friend, make your most generous gift of $10, $50, $100, or even $250 to sponsor a meal for veterans before the conference begins.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=6013239f6e1448689571052389a7674e&_e=nmSOZznbO1P5Rsd5XopnPWBSt6DXtWlwHTVckxKvcQhaxyDgOhl-gREXc2al_3py4K2ieHyUMzmJARpSxjKQrrBWgtxRP6D7gB9fqTBhxZFRD9Q94bzPIe6lRPiVSVUGhmbHrJXwZekG-c9qiGCGwx1Os91zXlB6NFh-9fiIchwseYBjlX6CAYp3UaabQV31fQWv6JfCmn2-J2dOHDI5Caxsoa0AehZ_C6cCJQCefTH3W3t-b9M_FvzTsLn9FNnHGk_OOMWtIPNyG805IoNacCIYSGHj4n2dHLYtEi38iuKJP2fJ5rB80UAcmQq_Ss5jXaFd-AECjBKlqiI5dRGpmhYdo2EfQq4UF1O8NMCJUMmgSCs8afzkgGnCTqQkmtXpFfxr93f-4IMnMonj2a3G4YzYydanTTZVPqfA1bJ3vt6I2SmYqdgD2WnEUl7fa5D2hhUHnpvEIra8B-_QK5o5UEXKSBqg8HFyVGxt1sgamUviu-0J0nEV0uJB7EmesnkAZ-kjlAmGTVkVhbTzu_LZvZnChHUrkfiSeF2SBTmrATPN6vC7b2kCypBCEtJHpeqYl7sS_PI_GQ24Ja0LBZ0Uxqr19-8ADyVyzO5Ajb37YCWo9dDM9dxxBGmQ6xR6b8TvzXduJcL-kuMbB3jjUwagPggKHMD_Xb9KEfBExF5s82Vij36QhnfyDcPlFwcDxVkPwfZjEg2oqHHj--XWhDHpgKR7UzGcRIFHpjrsyfWoIsm4Ok57SLJhJ6O5gCKVGQrFj0aWcqZEZR-S9O_RUf81x24tG5vSw-BX2DrqjfS86OecLyw1__Jz551hG8aOkerZ6uum_rMvyelBQNvJ0JUL2w%3D%3D)**

clean_body: Toast freedom. Sponsor a veteran’s beer. For just $10, you can buy a veteran a beer at this year's American Valor Conference. | | | Friend, It's just a pint...but it means everything. At this year's 28th annual American Valor Conference in November, veterans from World War II, Korea, Vietnam, and the War on Terror will gather in Washington, D.C. to share their stories with the next generation of cadets and midshipmen. During the conference our heroes will gather for a special evening reception. After a day of powerful storytelling, they'll have the chance to relax, reconnect, and raise a glass in camaraderie. And you can be the one who makes that toast possible. The American Veterans Center (AVC) preserves and promotes the legacy of America's veterans -- from the Greatest Generation to today's warriors. Through oral histories, educational initiatives, and hosting the National Memorial Day Parade and our annual American Valor Conference and televised gala, AVC ensures veterans ' stories are remembered and passed down and their legacies of service and sacrifice are never forgotten. The American Valor Conference is where America's heroes gather to share their stories with one another and the next generation of military leaders. Through panels, keynotes, and our nationally televised gala American Valor: A Salute to Our Heroes , the conference preserves stories of sacrifice while inspiring tomorrow's leaders. When you give, you're buying a beer, yes -- but you're joining a mission that connects Americans to their heroes in ways both symbolic and unforgettable. Friend, this simple gesture carries enormous meaning. A cold beer at the end of the day becomes a toast to freedom, service, and sacrifice. And your gift makes it possible. Of course, if you'd like to go further, you can also sponsor a meal for a veteran -- $50 for one meal, $100 for two, $250 for a table. Moments like these shape lives, Friend. At last year's conference, a cadet from Texas A&M called the experience of sharing a pint with WWII heroes "truly inspirational -- something I will never forget." At nearly every meal, young cadets will sit side-by-side with World War II heroes, listening to stories of Normandy, Iwo Jima, and the Chosin Reservoir - thanks to you. At the evening reception, post-9/11 veterans will raise a glass in fellowship - thanks to you. These simple moments carry a profound message: America remembers, honors, and thanks her veterans - and inspires the next generation to follow in their footsteps. Your generosity ensures every veteran at the conference feels the gratitude of a grateful nation -- and inspires the next generation to follow in their footsteps. Tim Holbert President American Veterans Center The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center 1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201

disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23594%2E4449941%2EfaJk7z) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23594%2E4449941%2EfaJk7z) [**Listen, this is a long _but serious_ email about everything going on with Social Security.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69855?t=3&akid=23594%2E4449941%2EfaJk7z) **FIRST:** Donald Trump used his phony DOGE agency to ATTACK and DISMANTLE Social Security... _even though over 64 million Americans rely on it!_

**THEN:** He used the Republican’s government shutdown to target Social Security and Medicare even further.

**AND NOW: He’s threatening to do away with Social Security altogether!** [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69855?t=4&akid=23594%2E4449941%2EfaJk7z) [ **So we’re rushing to gather 50,000 signatures by midnight to DEMAND Congress save Social Security. We’re still down [2,998] signatures from your state, so please, will you sign our emergency petition now? >>**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69855?t=5&akid=23594%2E4449941%2EfaJk7z) | [SIGN NOW >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69855?t=6&akid=23594%2E4449941%2EfaJk7z)
---
Look,

Social Security is a lifeline for the 64 million Americans who depend on it!

If Trump cuts Social Security, there’s no telling how many seniors would be pushed below the poverty line. **_We simply cannot afford to let this happen._**

Senator Amy Klobuchar summed it up perfectly:
[]()
[**That’s why we’ve launched a MASSIVE petition to stand with Senator Klobuchar and demand Congress protect Social Security. But we can’t do this alone...**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69855?t=7&akid=23594%2E4449941%2EfaJk7z)

[**We NEED to hit 50,000 signatures before midnight, or there’s no telling what Trump and his MAGA minions in Congress will do. Please, will you sign our petition now to help SAVE Social Security? >>**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69855?t=8&akid=23594%2E4449941%2EfaJk7z)
[SIGN NOW >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69855?t=9&akid=23594%2E4449941%2EfaJk7z)
---
Counting on you,

Fight for Reform

name: Ted Corcoran, AOTL
subject: I need to let you in on something:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
This is the most energy we’ve seen in years.
|
---

Peter,
These days, it can sometimes feel like your actions don’t matter.
As Deputy Campaigns Director for All On The Line, I fight to protect democracy here in my home state of North Carolina and in states like Texas, Missouri, and Ohio. Each time a state moves to redraw its maps, our team hosts trainings and events that organize voters to fight back.
And I need to fill you in on something.
**I can say with all honesty that we’re seeing a groundswell of volunteers like we have not seen in years.** These are Americans passionate about issues like health care, immigration, and reproductive rights — and understand that progress on these important issues is directly linked to gerrymandering.
I can safely say it’s the most energized and passionate the fair maps movement has ever been. And it’s all thanks to people like you, who power our work organizing volunteers, peacefully protesting, and making voters’ voices heard. And it’s starting to pay off — in recent weeks, we’ve seen more lawmakers grow wary of pursuing extreme mid-decade gerrymanders, from Indiana to Kansas.
[**Will you build on our momentum by powering All On The Line’s grassroots work with a donation today? We’re able to do this work and mobilize people on the ground because of supporters like you, Peter.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118976299/581514237/2092430633?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_TheMostEnergy_email_20251109-AOTL-Tier1-TheMostEnergy_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251109-AOTL-Tier1-TheMostEnergy_&utm_campaign=TheMostEnergy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdkNjBmMDQ3LTllYmQtZjAxMS04MTk0LTAwMjI0ODIzZmY5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DgLbNsP5zQcFmAp4pJhbh879iBMHlxsmg_8EqExON3A=)

Every day, I work with communities who feel locked out of the democratic system — and they’re right to feel that way. When politicians hand-pick their voters (instead of the other way around), democracy stops working. And the worst part is that’s their intention.
But I’ve also seen something else — people fighting back. Across the country, organizers, volunteers, and everyday citizens are standing up and saying “enough.” They’re demanding transparency, fairness, and accountability.
So today, I’m here to echo what I’ve heard in every state I’ve worked in:
We draw the line at maps that divide and conquer.
We draw the line at leaders who rig the rules to keep power.
And we draw the line at a legislature that works only for itself, not for the people it represents.
This isn’t just a state issue — it’s a national one. But that also means it’s a national opportunity. Across this country, Americans are proving that the fight for fair maps and fair representation is alive and growing.
**And we won’t stop until we get the democracy we all deserve.**
[**If you’re able, make a donation to power the next phase of this fight for fair representation. Your donation will be immediately put to work to fight for our democracy in the places that most need our help.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118976311/581514250/2092430633?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_TheMostEnergy_email_20251109-AOTL-Tier1-TheMostEnergy_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251109-AOTL-Tier1-TheMostEnergy_&utm_campaign=TheMostEnergy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdkNjBmMDQ3LTllYmQtZjAxMS04MTk0LTAwMjI0ODIzZmY5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DgLbNsP5zQcFmAp4pJhbh879iBMHlxsmg_8EqExON3A=)
Thank you for being a critical part of this grassroots movement.
Ted Corcoran
Deputy Campaigns Director, All On The Line

clean_body: This is the most energy we’ve seen in years. | Peter, These days, it can sometimes feel like your actions don’t matter. As Deputy Campaigns Director for All On The Line, I fight to protect democracy here in my home state of North Carolina and in states like Texas, Missouri, and Ohio. Each time a state moves to redraw its maps, our team hosts trainings and events that organize voters to fight back. And I need to fill you in on something. I can say with all honesty that we’re seeing a groundswell of volunteers like we have not seen in years. These are Americans passionate about issues like health care, immigration, and reproductive rights — and understand that progress on these important issues is directly linked to gerrymandering. I can safely say it’s the most energized and passionate the fair maps movement has ever been. And it’s all thanks to people like you, who power our work organizing volunteers, peacefully protesting, and making voters’ voices heard. And it’s starting to pay off — in recent weeks, we’ve seen more lawmakers grow wary of pursuing extreme mid-decade gerrymanders, from Indiana to Kansas. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Every day, I work with communities who feel locked out of the democratic system — and they’re right to feel that way. When politicians hand-pick their voters (instead of the other way around), democracy stops working. And the worst part is that’s their intention. But I’ve also seen something else — people fighting back. Across the country, organizers, volunteers, and everyday citizens are standing up and saying “enough.” They’re demanding transparency, fairness, and accountability. So today, I’m here to echo what I’ve heard in every state I’ve worked in: We draw the line at maps that divide and conquer. We draw the line at leaders who rig the rules to keep power. And we draw the line at a legislature that works only for itself, not for the people it represents. This isn’t just a state issue — it’s a national one. But that also means it’s a national opportunity. Across this country, Americans are proving that the fight for fair maps and fair representation is alive and growing. And we won’t stop until we get the democracy we all deserve. = Thank you for being a critical part of this grassroots movement. Ted Corcoran Deputy Campaigns Director, All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. name: Team Pou
subject: This Thanksgiving will cost more
body:
Families are paying the price for MAGA's failure.

| |
---
Hi friend, The holidays should be a time of comfort, but this MAGA Congress is putting immense stress on every American family. This holiday season, families will face higher grocery bills, higher home energy costs, and more expensive gifts. Why? Because MAGA refuses to do their jobs. And those holiday gifts? Sky-high because of this administration’s reckless tariffs. They slapped on tariffs without a plan, without a strategy, and without care. Now, families are paying the price. clean_body: I’m laser-focused on this one thing. | Fellow American, You're probably getting lots of fundraising emails. Believe it or not, I get them too! In fact, Senate Republicans recently OUTRAISED Senate Democrats, so I'm not going to give you a sky-is-falling fundraising pitch. Senate Majority Leader, I'm focused on the ONE and ONLY thing that wins elections: So, my priority right now is fixing the fact that our party's voter file isLAGGING behind the Democrats'. Look, we can be winning in the polls (we are), we can be winning by passing President Trump's agenda in the Senate and HOLDING THE LINE against Schumer's Shutdown (we are), and we can be winning in popularity over the Democrats (we absolutely are)... ...But unless we have a 100% verified voter file, we'll lose everything to the Democrats, We need to MATCH that energy and determination. We can't let Democrats take back the reins of the Senate for the second half of the Trump-Vance presidency. Thank you, Senator John Thune If you want to help Republicans KEEP THE SENATE MAJORITY, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. “A Blue Wave is Building”
— The Cook Political Report, 11/5/25
Political experts are saying that thanks to amazing Democratic turnout in the 2025 elections, a Blue Wave could be in store for 2026!
With the U.S. Senate race in Michigan rated as a pure toss-up, it will be one of the most important races to win to help Democrats flip Senate control.
The DeVos political machine and their billionaire megadonors will do everything they can to stifle our movement and flip Michigan red . They’re already attacking Governor Whitmer on the airwaves.
We can’t give them an inch. Not after Democrats overperformed across the country on Tuesday.
Fight Like Hell PAC is building a movement to register voters, organize across every corner of Michigan and beyond, and elect leaders who will deliver on the kitchen-table issues that help working families get ahead.
But we need your help. The ONLY way we can win is if we have the resources to compete.

End the Epstein cover-up – NOW
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118977239/581517590/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDIzMTBmYi1hNWJkLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6MHdZWmtExYjLUVSTWn8hp1_gMJdyKnzAg3L4Mr5BYA=)

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118977240/581517591/789508428?refcode=251109_RG_coverup-fr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDIzMTBmYi1hNWJkLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6MHdZWmtExYjLUVSTWn8hp1_gMJdyKnzAg3L4Mr5BYA=)
_**This exposes, in black and white, that the Trump Administration has been lying about Epstein for years.**_
It’s the clearest evidence yet that Trump’s allies have been running a full-blown cover-up — and Republicans in Congress are helping him do it.
Meanwhile, the White House is still refusing to release the full Epstein files. Speaker Mike Johnson is still refusing to swear in Adelita Grijalva, the key vote that would finally force the release of these documents.
**Why? Because they’re terrified of what we’ll find — and who we’ll find — when the truth finally comes out.**
Let’s be clear: This is a corruption crisis.
Trump’s inner circle protected a convicted predator. They buried evidence, silenced victims, and lied to Congress. And now, while millions of Americans are suffering through a government shutdown, they’re still hiding the names of the powerful men who committed horrific crimes.
The American people deserve the truth — every survivor deserves justice — and I won’t stop until we get it.
But to finish this fight, we need a new Congress that believes in transparency and accountability. That means flipping the House, exposing Trump’s lies, and ending the Epstein cover-up once and for all.

[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118977242/581517593/-309737922?refcode=251109_RG_coverup-fr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDIzMTBmYi1hNWJkLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6MHdZWmtExYjLUVSTWn8hp1_gMJdyKnzAg3L4Mr5BYA=)
We've come too far to back down now.
Thanks for standing with me,
Robert Garcia

body:
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=a6120422812a45c3be79ee331010f87c&_e=FWHMA6_eYGqtSgkYJkI6JN1dApgPreOKN_dsHiDS-yYXs1YHlEueDMTu2h_vJowx__GSryTpztTCBxFaDZH4lhcFYMJ8IpXAXlGIqVbum1s5VyNJ2SHAmQwRKXxEWr4oRM6CA_QkcrgxuvS0VzRfVsNPM4KAtzEYNtqXNLg_oIa75kvyR-gbWunDBtTS5E1mZaCeNkESnzu_AXsUVU-9x4siPKqDovtyqwTWmHkpy_9O92Yvw-j59Qo0MFonQKwdp_IIfiUXpNe1rqRJWtxx3dD6l1VAMGGutugGTtQpyDZlB14pyNBv3CTamYLghPkEwL6QdTRlpKKWRwszhAQCKjIP4YodViG7vovxbmpxzIGPtQTdKkar13DunlE8zgjPEn-j58BcSIT2fxymY2_XXjaB6hP_1jVTvAg2x_8vLpeVw1tTnNEBjs5blk6IN3R2Bp9ubRCk0HHIuUsUv98_Ux1Qg09KV3JcLYPUIx5iU9oeYFyIasCbpLb7oI4t1UbOo-wkJuRb063xWdktkiOxjFseaERVYDauLEjOovAL-LtmlY9zk3wUHT8exEfxoATv0ILQDGI-D9CbFcTKzwJqcQ%3D%3D)

Friend,

We need to have an honest conversation about who we allow into our country.

**Let me introduce you to Zohran Mamdani, the new SOCIALIST mayor of New York City.**
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=a6120422812a45c3be79ee331010f87c&_e=FWHMA6_eYGqtSgkYJkI6JN1dApgPreOKN_dsHiDS-yYXs1YHlEueDMTu2h_vJowx__GSryTpztTCBxFaDZH4lhcFYMJ8IpXAXlGIqVbum1s5VyNJ2SHAmQwRKXxEWr4oRM6CA_QkcrgxuvS0VzRfVuolYuaCb1zsR8xlPih-z9dAh3dr9hUgpC_ybPi4R18hoH6ZZzfXnv_4LXVeGsktWOmFXDzalRo5MCYoKIqJWtHcJJyItfNhTY19VjYl1mUA6iVD3SdbZWr6t5c1dVrTA3FSLRYKQ-BPQMDNN-SM9htMYar4P1_uAF12DwXOS8uU3UAPcGXa1kmZAdtpyKm0Wy447VrejiqROFJCIyMr-GZ-eZvukZAO7TCZqpmlfbhOBr4HIgDvdz4bCRj3bMpDTCCdVwmYQAoAjWUC_2_FPVgJzU4PvfGtK3M1vAXS5Snk4abSwrXLqbxz9v-gLYvkURaQ-wgiVXeoXw3nDO3NJrmSGjD210Grhx2Y-E7jxlp_sF6ioqTZ57chf5OLGETUKrlQun_lDg6SFaKahqG3s3usynNYpUfOyJ4n0eQfNH5A9tp23pxzWiOn3pt2PTt-1Q%3D%3D)
Charlie had Mamdani pegged from Day 1. He knew that, despite his attempts to portray himself as a modern Western man, Mamdani was nothing more than a dangerous radical, hell-bent on devastating New York City with policies straight out of _The Communist Manifesto_.

A self-declared socialist, Mamdani wants to "globalize the intifada" and import values into the West that will destroy New York City and destabilize our civilization.

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee's name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.'s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.'s non-contribution account are not tax-deductible for federal income tax purposes.

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade, it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in a democracy, not a dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. To finance our winning strategy, we need as many $24.87 contributions as possible to keep pace with Scott Perry's mega-donors. | | | | | Together, we can flip PA-10. — Janelle Stelson | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | | Blue Amp Action PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade, it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in a democracy, not a dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | Paid for by Blue Amp Action | | or

name: Jon Ossoff for Senate
subject: Absolutely pummeled
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Friend,

As you read this, Jon Ossoff is getting absolutely pummeled by attack ads in Georgia. Republicans have spent more than _$10 million_ on TV and online already. It’s ridiculous.

Why so much money, this far from Election Day?

Because Jon Ossoff is the only Democratic Senator running for reelection in a state won by Trump. _That_ is why Republicans are hitting him so hard, so early in the campaign.

_And it’s why we’re coming to you with this request to help fight back._

If Jon is going to defend this seat, we _really_ need to keep hitting our fundraising goals, and donations to emails like this are a huge part of how it happens.

**_[Can Jon Ossoff count on you to contribute $10, $50 or whatever you can afford to help him lay the foundation for a winning Senate reelection campaign here in Georgia? Your donation will be split between his reelection campaign and Maggie Hassan.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118978606/581522002/32293070?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.11.09_Jon-Ossoff-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_30OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmE2M2EwZi1hOGJkLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3Pl5yyI_ymFquAsPBHlc1Pfsq7IGxv5O7FuXzVEI9HQ=)_** | | [ DONATE NOW >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118978607/581522003/32293070?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.11.09_Jon-Ossoff-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_30OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmE2M2EwZi1hOGJkLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3Pl5yyI_ymFquAsPBHlc1Pfsq7IGxv5O7FuXzVEI9HQ=)
---
We wish we didn’t have to ask at all, but _Citizens United_ opened the dam for limitless dark money to flood into our elections.

_That’s a big part of why Congress is broken and corrupted. It’s why we have really expensive elections._

And also it’s why campaigns like ours have to build serious grassroots fundraising operations _from the very start._

Because if we don’t, we run the risk of our message getting drowned out by a flood of Super PAC spending.

So here’s the truth:

**Jon needs our help _today_.**

_He is literally MAGA’s #1 target._

They will spare no expense and try every dirty trick in the book.

So yes, this election will be tough.

But this team knows how to win tough fights. We’ve done it before.

Let’s do it again.

**_[Please, use this link to support Jon’s reelection campaign and Maggie Hassan. Every donation counts. Every donation sends a powerful message to MAGA that we’re ready to fight and win.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118978608/581522004/32293070?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.11.09_Jon-Ossoff-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_30OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmE2M2EwZi1hOGJkLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3Pl5yyI_ymFquAsPBHlc1Pfsq7IGxv5O7FuXzVEI9HQ=)_**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Jon Ossoff and Maggie Hassan will go through immediately:_

clean_body: Friend, As you read this, Jon Ossoff is getting absolutely pummeled by attack ads in Georgia. Republicans have spent more than $10 million on TV and online already. It’s ridiculous. Why so much money, this far from Election Day? Because Jon Ossoff is the only Democratic Senator running for reelection in a state won by Trump. That is why Republicans are hitting him so hard, so early in the campaign. And it’s why we’re coming to you with this request to help fight back. If Jon is going to defend this seat, we really need to keep hitting our fundraising goals, and donations to emails like this are a huge part of how it happens. = | | = We wish we didn’t have to ask at all, but Citizens United opened the dam for limitless dark money to flood into our elections. That’s a big part of why Congress is broken and corrupted. It’s why we have really expensive elections. And also it’s why campaigns like ours have to build serious grassroots fundraising operations from the very start. Because if we don’t, we run the risk of our message getting drowned out by a flood of Super PAC spending. So here’s the truth: Jon needs our help today. He is literally MAGA’s #1 target. They will spare no expense and try every dirty trick in the book. So yes, this election will be tough. But this team knows how to win tough fights. We’ve done it before. Let’s do it again. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Jon Ossoff and Maggie Hassan will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you! — Team Ossoff If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Roy Cooper
subject: Something’s weighing on my mind, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
| | |
---
My opponent has been gaining on me in the polls. Far-right actors are attacking me online. National GOP groups are pouring money into NC to defeat me and our people-first campaign.
_This is all weighing on my mind, Derek._
I know we have a tough race ahead of us — the most competitive of my career. The coming months won’t be easy.
**But here’s what keeps me going:** We’ve earned financial support from tens of thousands of folks across the country. More than 90% of donors are giving $100 or less. Even more are sharing news of our campaign online.
Together, we’re building the momentum we need to win the most competitive U.S. Senate race in the nation. I’m deeply grateful to everyone who has joined us so far.
[**I’m asking for you to join our fight by splitting a contribution between our campaign and John Fetterman today. Would just $5 fit in your budget right away?**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52312?t=1&akid=10419%2E434096%2E0-mta9)
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Roy Cooper and John Fetterman will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $5 NOW](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52313?t=2&akid=10419%2E434096%2E0-mta9)

Roy Cooper

name: Swamp Digest
subject: Extraordinary Courage. Extraordinary Comeback.
body:
unsubscribe
https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xul=o5pvyewrzrxe8xiau9slbgewz9q6dy52n1s45arxuwov3ht54ym3skttyvplbjv022hc5y2o8fuvefc9sznb9e613d4zo7pfrkign1c&__stmp=t5h77b&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please read the message below from our sponsor.

“I did everything I could for him ...”

https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=4pnzskqdibz2663srxjzh2flospt3zopsoj3pne2vpjbd6al7ht60rlicfnhvfrql6vuhliijj34p1333mhqy5ktomxqujd1tgthqa2n7l1e5p7481mitkzylbk9ut6cy6iv5h8edvxzukno8sg1xi8pq&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t5h77b&__onlt=t

https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=4pnzskqdibz2663srxjzh2flospt3zopsoj3pne2vpjbd6al7ht60rlicfnhvfrql6vuhliijj34p1333mhqy5ktomxqujd1tgthqa2n7l1e5p7481mitkzylbk9ut6cy6iv5h8edvxzukno8sg1xi8pq&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t5h77b&__onlt=t

Not long ago, Dr. Shafir Botner, director of MAGEN DAVID ADOM’s paramedic school and a Medevac helicopter paramedic, was treating injured civilians at the scene of a rocket strike in Be’er Sheva, Israel, when he looked up and recognized a familiar face. There, working alongside the MAGEN DAVID ADOM team to assist the injured civilians was Chief Inspector Or Yosef of the Israel Police.

The last time Dr. Botner had seen him, Inspector Yosef was fighting for his life after being critically wounded by an RPG while helping civilians during the Nova Music Festival massacre on October 7, 2023.

A MAGEN DAVID ADOM paramedic was treating the inspector when he realized Yosef would not survive long enough to make it to the hospital in his ambulance. So, he immediately called for a helicopter.

When Dr. Botner and his crew landed, they quickly loaded Inspector Yosef into the helicopter.
They knew every second mattered
https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=4pnzskqdibz2663srxjzh2flospt3zopsoj3pne2vpjbd6al7ht60rlicfnhvfrql6vuhliijj34p1333mhqy5ktomxqujd1tgthqa2n7l1e5p7481mitkzylbk9ut6cy6iv5h8edvxzukno8sg1xi8pq&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t5h77b&__onlt=t
.

“He was in very serious condition and had lost a massive amount of blood.

I did everything I could for him.”

But now, this patient who so nearly died on October 7 was not only still alive, he was also outside helping others. Seeing Inspector Yosef up on his feet and back on the job filled Dr. Botner with emotion.

“Or Yosef is truly an inspiration. To return to the field after such a devastating injury and help others injured in a missile attack — that’s extraordinary.”

I wish you could go with me sometime when I visit the MAGEN DAVID ADOM National Dispatch Center just outside Tel Aviv or one of the 206 MAGEN DAVID ADOM emergency medical stations located across Israel. There you will encounter some of the most extraordinary men and women you may ever meet.

There is something about the determination and compassion I see in their faces that always moves me. They are there to save lives.

HELP SAVE LIVES IN ISRAEL ►
https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=4pnzskqdibz2663srxjzh2flospt3zopsoj3pne2vpjbd6al7ht60rlicfnhvfrql6vuhliijj34p1333mhqy5ktomxqujd1tgthqa2n7l1e5p7481mitkzylbk9ut6cy6iv5h8edvxzukno8sg1xi8pq&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t5h77b&__onlt=t

It takes grit and guts to do what they do every day. When a call comes in, they respond without hesitation — missiles may be falling, active shooters may be on the scene, buildings may be burning, but they are committed to going above and beyond to save as many lives as possible, even if it means putting their own lives on the line.

Again and again, these paramedics, EMTs, and first responders rise above fear, push beyond limits, and stand in the gap. Their bravery, their sacrifice, their relentless dedication — it’s nothing less than extraordinary.

May I ask you today to
give to support these exceptional women and men
https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=4pnzskqdibz2663srxjzh2flospt3zopsoj3pne2vpjbd6al7ht60rlicfnhvfrql6vuhliijj34p1333mhqy5ktomxqujd1tgthqa2n7l1e5p7481mitkzylbk9ut6cy6iv5h8edvxzukno8sg1xi8pq&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t5h77b&__onlt=t
?

MAGEN DAVID ADOM relies almost entirely upon private donations and not government funding — which means the people of Israel are counting on the faithful financial support of generous friends like you so that help is able to come in moments of dire need.

Your gift
https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=4pnzskqdibz2663srxjzh2flospt3zopsoj3pne2vpjbd6al7ht60rlicfnhvfrql6vuhliijj34p1333mhqy5ktomxqujd1tgthqa2n7l1e5p7481mitkzylbk9ut6cy6iv5h8edvxzukno8sg1xi8pq&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t5h77b&__onlt=t
will provide the medical supplies and equipment, blood reserves, and emergency vehicles that these extraordinary modern-day heroes must have to save every man, woman, and child possible.

God bless you,

Catherine Reed

Chief Executive Officer

GIVE TO SAVE LIVES ►
https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=4pnzskqdibz2663srxjzh2flospt3zopsoj3pne2vpjbd6al7ht60rlicfnhvfrql6vuhliijj34p1333mhqy5ktomxqujd1tgthqa2n7l1e5p7481mitkzylbk9ut6cy6iv5h8edvxzukno8sg1xi8pq&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t5h77b&__onlt=t

MAGEN DAVID ADOM is Israel’s emergency services system, providing critical medical care and ambulance services for victims of terror, natural disasters, automobile accidents, and all other emergencies in Israel. It is also responsible for Israel’s national blood supply. MAGEN DAVID ADOM saves lives in Israel every day. Become a

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. subject: Choose to Delight (Psalm 37:4)
body:
Delight thyself also in the LORD; and he shall give thee the desires of thine heart." -- Psalm 37:4 (KJV)
