Today I'm struck by how direct this is. God isn't speaking to a crowd; He's speaking to **me**. Not "you all." **Me.** He instructs me to _delight_ --to be deliciously happy in Him. Not in headlines. Not in polls. Not in last Tuesday's election results (even if they had gone my way).
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/24c995e1-af3b-4661-bc44-44c2347a0749?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
When my joy is rooted in the unchanging God, I don't have to live on the emotional rollercoaster--up when things look good, down when they don't, dizzy when evil people do arrogant, self-serving things that wound the innocent. Even in this, I can delight myself in the Lord. That's the command.
And here's the promise: **" He shall give you the desires of thine heart."**
Not the whims of my mood, but the deep desires He's shaping within me:
* **Peace** that stills anxious hearts and quiets our homes.
* **Goodness** that overcomes cynicism and corruption.
* **Innocence protected** for our children.
* **Work with purpose** --jobs that use our gifts and dignify our days.
* **Strong, secure families** that endure storms and pass on hope.

This is not escapism. It's alignment. When I delight in Him, He tunes my heart to want what He wants--and then He delights to give it.
**My prayer today:**
Lord, I choose to delight in You--because You are God, I choose to dance deliriously underneath Your wings...before results, beyond outcomes, above the noise. Plant Your desires deep in my heart and bring them to life: peace in our communities, protection for our children, purposeful work, and families made strong. Amen.
If this speaks to you, take one minute right now: whisper "I delight in You, Lord," and watch how your heart steadies--even while the world keeps spinning.
~Blessings...

subject: What it will take to help me stay competitive in this race.

body:
NEWSWEEK: Ohio’s 2026 gubernatorial election appears to be competitive for Democrats who have slipped in support in the state over the past decade.

We need a landslide victory that sends a message across the nation - just like President Trump did in 2024. | | I'm not doing this for a political career. I'm doing this to get the job done -- and leave this country stronger for the next generation. Let 's make Ohio the leader of America's revival. Thank you -- and God bless the United States of America. ** Vivek Ramaswamy Candidate for Governor of Ohio | | | PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO 350 E 1st Ave Ste 100 Columbus, OH 43201 If you would like to opt-out of important updates like this,

name: Katie Porter HQ
subject: Our latest memo
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40390%2E3422442%2EtEpi9f)
Dear Peter,
Our campaign spends a lot of time strategizing to make sure Katie Porter wins this race for California governor. Today, we’re sharing our latest **State of the Race memo** so you can see what we’re up against and why your support matters right now.
**[But first, can you chip in $5 to make sure we have the resources to win the June primary and the November general election?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251109_1_ak.ZDtqaO&refcode=em20251109-40390&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=40390%2E3422442%2EtEpi9f)**
* * *
FROM: Katie Porter for Governor
TO: Supporters & Interested Parties
SUBJECT: State of the Race
**Polling:**
* Katie Porter has been the **Democratic frontrunner** in every poll of this race since July.
* She has consistently received double or triple the support of the next closest Democrat.
* She leads declared and prospective candidates — showing her grassroots support is strong and steady.
* **A Republican just took the lead in this race.**
* In a recent poll, Steve Hilton is beating Katie.
* Republicans have two candidates polling well, while Democratic support is spread out among the other candidates. If we don’t consolidate support behind Katie, then **Democrats could be boxed out of the general election entirely.**
* Many voters are still undecided.
* These undecided voters will decide this race. We have to reach them with our message before other campaigns do.

**Experience:**
* With Trump back in office, Katie is the fighter California needs in Sacramento.
* As a consumer protection attorney, Katie was appointed by then-Attorney General Kamala Harris to be California’s Monitor of the mortgage settlement, holding the Big Banks accountable for delivering billions in relief to California homeowners.
* She first ran for Congress to stand up to the Trump Administration’s assault on workers and families, earning notoriety for grilling CEOs and Trump officials in congressional hearings who were hurting Americans.

**Endorsements:**
* Katie has earned the endorsement of five statewide unions.
* The Teamsters, UAW, SMART, NUHW, and ATU, which collectively represent hundreds of thousands of California workers.
* Katie is also endorsed by both EMILY's List and Elect Democratic Women.
* **Katie has the strongest supporters of any candidate in this race** – and we will continue to expand our coalition as we push to victory next year.

**Our Grassroots Competitive Edge:**
* Katie Porter has the grassroots energy in this race.
* Tens of thousands of small-dollar donors continue to power this campaign.
* On the road, we see that folks are fired up and ready to work hard to elect Katie as our next governor, because they know she’ll lower costs and stand up to Donald Trump.

* * *
Thank you for taking the time to read our memo, Peter. As you can see, this race is close and the stakes couldn’t be higher. Supporters like you help us build momentum and stay competitive.
**[Can you chip in $5 today to build on the momentum we have and power this campaign to victory?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251109_1_ak.ZDtqaO&refcode=em20251109-40390&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=40390%2E3422442%2EtEpi9f)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251109_1_ak.ZDtqaO&refcode=em20251109-40390&t=23&akid=40390%2E3422442%2EtEpi9f)
Thank you,
Katie Porter HQ

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20251109-40390&amounts=&t=24&refcode2=40390_3422442_tEpi9f&akid=40390%2E3422442%2EtEpi9f)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4g-emails?source=40390&t=25&akid=40390%2E3422442%2EtEpi9f)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4g-em-update-info-footer?source=40390)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=40390&t=26&akid=40390%2E3422442%2EtEpi9f)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
FFPC #1479597

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/eae4f16f-506f-4469-9b5e-d9884091b20c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
### ✨✨[Our Victory Celebration Sale Ends At Midnight!](https://substack.com/redirect/eae4f16f-506f-4469-9b5e-d9884091b20c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)✨✨
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/dad99722-00ad-4be3-945f-3a6dadb9bb85?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In nearly 250 years of the American experiment, the United States has endured a bevy of political tyrants, scoundrels, and traitors, from Benedict Arnold to Jefferson Davis to Joseph McCarthy.
Yet, even among this rogue's gallery of starters on Satan's softball team, Donald Trump has found a way to stand out--and _stand back and stand by_. Chiefly, it is through his absolute disregard for the life or health of every other human being on Earth, and perhaps especially those in close proximity to him.
Trump is so content in his obliviousness to all hominids not named Donald Trump that last week, during his little look-at-me press conference on Big Pharma's new discount for weight-loss drugs, the man even got in some quality shut-eye.
While slumped in, as Trent Reznor called it, his "liar's chair."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/eae4f16f-506f-4469-9b5e-d9884091b20c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_I wear this crown of thorns
Upon my liar's chair
Full of broken thoughts
I cannot repair_
_**Johnny Cash (version) "Hurt"**_
* * *
Stay in the loop with a free subscription.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.qDr7NSjkw4GElh-y1BSDuanL6bslJnBqoUUJ2u2fVBQ?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=178304865)
* * *
Yet, it's Trump's malignant narcissism, with a side of sociopathy, that's what really shone through. There is no sense of duty, no honor, no morality or character. Just needy, petty, constant spasms of self-pity unworthy of a playground squabble, much less the Oval Office.
But seemingly nobody ever told this to Donald J. Trump. So when he was done with his doze--one assumes in service of resting his girlish figure and stumpy, dwarfish digits--he unlatched his large, dumbfounded eyes to see an actual live press event still transpiring around him.
Just as suddenly, Novo Nordisk representative Gordon Findlay, one of the guest speakers there to hail his company's weight-loss drugs, or perhaps Caesar, collapsed. Everyone in the room immediately rushed towards him to make sure he was ok.
Everyone except two people present, that is.
One, RFK Jr., rushed out like he'd just been told there was a two-for-one Ivermectin sale being provided by his former heroine dealer. And, look, if there's one person who truly needs a de-wormer, as we know from his own tales of his former cranial bunkmate, _it 's that guy_.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/19096b49-004e-4e75-bb39-f3fac8551c60?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The second nonplussed numb nuts in the room, who showed the same kinda interest in Findlay's well-being as Nick Fuentes would if handed the Talmud, was Trump.
The man barely changed expression.
A blank look blanketed that carrot-cake visage that only changed long enough for him to show perturbance at the audacity of this fainter to step on **his** big moment. He may have glanced for 0.2 seconds in Findlay's direction. Then Trump promptly readjusted that large watermelon resting on his shoulders in the exact opposite direction.
The cameras, of course, kept rolling. And still Trump couldn't be bothered to show the slightest affectation, profess the mildest pretense he possessed an ounce of empathy or a care in the world whether Findlay would spend another minute on our planet.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/eae4f16f-506f-4469-9b5e-d9884091b20c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
### ✨✨Our Victory Celebration Sale Ends At Midnight!✨✨
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c0bdcc72-914c-413b-b17e-0cced5ed0f8d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Trump didn't see a human in crisis; he saw a footnote in _" Trump Today"_ coverage. And who the hell was this guy to steal all the TV attention from President Donald J. Trump of _Celebrity Apprentice_?
Anyhow, Trump had more important things to vibe on, like subsequent opportunities to commit war crimes in international waters. Or whatever he might choose to have air-dropped into his two Wendy's $5 Biggie Bags for dinner after the mess behind him was removed.
It's kind of amazing that even grifty, sh*ty supplement hawker, Dr. Oz, reacted quickly in an attempt to assist Findlay (though, 50-50 whether he ransacked his pockets for loose change).
But not Trump.
Trump's indifference was as subtle as walking into Stephen Miller's bedroom to catch him sleeping while hanging from the ceiling. It had all the hallmarks of the diagnosis by over 200 health professionals that he's a malignant narcissist.
You can't argue that Trump's brand didn't meet the moment. He delivered spectacle over substance. Image over empathy. It was quite up for the challenge.
Hell, I half expected him to grab a microphone a la Ivan Drago in _Rocky IV_. Say in a perfect St. Petersburg dialect, mirrored during nightly Zoom lessons with Putin, "if he dies, he dies."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/05653838-ad40-47e6-9431-c8a7f112a662?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
His reaction to Findlay was the best metaphor possible for all we've seen of Trump's presidency and personality, all the consequences of electing pure immorality in gaseous and fluid form.
Yes, [we granted almost unlimited power to the single worst human in America](https://substack.com/redirect/189a5241-fb39-49e3-a775-36124fec9efa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), someone you wouldn't let watch your new iPhone, much less 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue.
That's how you end up with a human sweat-gland as President **who defies a court to purposely try and starve over 40 million hungry Americans --including over 20 million children**.
And it's not that he doesn't have the funds, which one would be forgiven for postulating, as Trump runs our government with the same hard-nosed planning and reality-based budgeting that highlighted his tenure at The Trump Taj Mahal.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/bb9070ce-af89-4aa7-a531-651ffb556824?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Again: **He has the funds. He has been ordered by a judge to disperse them. But the self-loathing lummox with the leisure suit chic** _**wants**_**to starve people.**
So he responded to the judge's order _by doubling down on withholding aid_. The Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP), **a food-stamp lifeline for millions** , is still being deliberately delayed and partially unfunded.
But, not one to pass up a fun time while depriving tens of millions of nutrition, while starving Americans, he threw himself a Great Gatsby party. Yes, a book whose main characters were described in this manner:
> They were careless people, Tom and Daisy--they smashed up things and creatures and then retreated back into their money or their vast carelessness, or whatever it was that kept them together, and let other people clean up the mess they had made
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c17b98dd-6499-4d3b-a0fa-0d6c48c95d8b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Because this is our dead-eyed, Dusky Shark President. A foul, necrotic wench who should be indicted again, this time for blowing irony's head off with a shotgun. The type of man who's vexed by someone keeling over in his office, showing all the compassion of a hyena with its leg caught in a trap. Or an Elon Musk.
A human goiter who surrounds himself with similarly sick individuals who shoot puppies in the face, and whose moms write them _un-fan mail_ about how they allegedly abuse women.
And a guy who covers everything with gold because he thinks it will somehow imbue him with importance and elite status. And who uses food funds to build a Second Estate ballroom. "His top priority," per his twenty-something mouthpiece married to a Social Security recipient.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2bcc4ec5-6a90-4b54-aa95-7ae7de79158d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The office of the presidency now resembles the worst after-party you skipped because you had to work in the morning. Walls turned golden, moldings fattened, sign slapped beside the "Oval Office" label so no one misses the bling, as Americans watch their food and health care vanish, their workers deported and their jobs disappear.
There's so much gold-generated gaudiness in the Oval Office that, if Goldfinger himself wandered in and looked around, he'd pause, tilt his head, and mutter: "What the f*k is wrong with this guy?"
At the end of the day, this isn't just a "bad look" moment--it's the crystallization of a presidency more preoccupied with the _appearance_ of power than the _exercise_ of responsibility.
Yet, a president who watches a man collapse and is bemused, then disgusted, is the perfect wretch to run[ the rancid Republican Party and its MAGA movement.](https://substack.com/redirect/db24e16b-05ff-4a1d-9db2-030e7fd2da91?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) A Cult of Cruelty that's brought our teetering democracy to the edge.
One that claims to be anti-trans, but has somehow transitioned Jesus Christ into Ayn Rand.
* * *
[Did you read ](https://substack.com/redirect/eae4f16f-506f-4469-9b5e-d9884091b20c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[Atlas Shrugged](https://substack.com/redirect/eae4f16f-506f-4469-9b5e-d9884091b20c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[? We're sorry. Subscribe now!](https://substack.com/redirect/eae4f16f-506f-4469-9b5e-d9884091b20c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.qDr7NSjkw4GElh-y1BSDuanL6bslJnBqoUUJ2u2fVBQ?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=178304865)
* * *
Americans are going hungry, and a classless jack-in-the-box is gilding everything. A narcissistic dunce whose sociopathic shrug in the White House is the best single moment to explain everything that's wrong with our rotting republic.
There must be Romans peering across the ocean, a knowing look in their eyes. They're surrounded by the remnants of their own Trump Era that tossed _their_ great experiment into the large compost heap of history.
[Unless we move forward with a boldness and determination they lacked](https://substack.com/redirect/f263de34-91e0-4f07-bdc6-f98abdd2d91d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) two millennia ago, they know what's coming.
### ✨✨[Our Victory Celebration Sale Ends At Midnight!](https://substack.com/redirect/eae4f16f-506f-4469-9b5e-d9884091b20c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)✨✨

clean_body: Cameras rolled, a man fell, and the self-anointed savior of America didn't even blink -- proving you can gild rot, but it still stinks. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Cameras rolled, a man fell, and the self-anointed savior of America didn't even blink -- proving you can gild rot, but it still stinks. | | and | Nov 9 | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- ✨✨✨✨ | | ---|---|--- In nearly 250 years of the American experiment, the United States has endured a bevy of political tyrants, scoundrels, and traitors, from Benedict Arnold to Jefferson Davis to Joseph McCarthy. Yet, even among this rogue's gallery of starters on Satan's softball team, Donald Trump has found a way to stand out--and stand back and stand by. Chiefly, it is through his absolute disregard for the life or health of every other human being on Earth, and perhaps especially those in close proximity to him. Trump is so content in his obliviousness to all hominids not named Donald Trump that last week, during his little look-at-me press conference on Big Pharma's new discount for weight-loss drugs, the man even got in some quality shut-eye. While slumped in, as Trent Reznor called it, his "liar's chair." | | ---|---|--- I wear this crown of thorns Upon my liar's chair Full of broken thoughts I cannot repair Johnny Cash (version) "Hurt" Stay in the loop with a free subscription. Yet, it's Trump's malignant narcissism, with a side of sociopathy, that's what really shone through. There is no sense of duty, no honor, no morality or character. Just needy, petty, constant spasms of self-pity unworthy of a playground squabble, much less the Oval Office. But seemingly nobody ever told this to Donald J. Trump. So when he was done with his doze--one assumes in service of resting his girlish figure and stumpy, dwarfish digits--he unlatched his large, dumbfounded eyes to see an actual live press event still transpiring around him. Just as suddenly, Novo Nordisk representative Gordon Findlay, one of the guest speakers there to hail his company's weight-loss drugs, or perhaps Caesar, collapsed. Everyone in the room immediately rushed towards him to make sure he was ok. Everyone except two people present, that is. One, RFK Jr., rushed out like he'd just been told there was a two-for-one Ivermectin sale being provided by his former heroine dealer. And, look, if there's one person who truly needs a de-wormer, as we know from his own tales of his former cranial bunkmate, it 's that guy. | | ---|---|--- The second nonplussed numb nuts in the room, who showed the same kinda interest in Findlay's well-being as Nick Fuentes would if handed the Talmud, was Trump. The man barely changed expression. A blank look blanketed that carrot-cake visage that only changed long enough for him to show perturbance at the audacity of this fainter to step on his big moment. He may have glanced for 0.2 seconds in Findlay's direction. Then Trump promptly readjusted that large watermelon resting on his shoulders in the exact opposite direction. The cameras, of course, kept rolling. And still Trump couldn't be bothered to show the slightest affectation, profess the mildest pretense he possessed an ounce of empathy or a care in the world whether Findlay would spend another minute on our planet. | | ---|---|--- ✨✨Our Victory Celebration Sale Ends At Midnight!✨✨ | | ---|---|--- Trump didn't see a human in crisis; he saw a footnote in " Trump Today" coverage. And who the hell was this guy to steal all the TV attention from President Donald J. Trump of Celebrity Apprentice? Anyhow, Trump had more important things to vibe on, like subsequent opportunities to commit war crimes in international waters. Or whatever he might choose to have air-dropped into his two Wendy's $5 Biggie Bags for dinner after the mess behind him was removed. It's kind of amazing that even grifty, shty supplement hawker, Dr. Oz, reacted quickly in an attempt to assist Findlay (though, 50-50 whether he ransacked his pockets for loose change). But not Trump. Trump's indifference was as subtle as walking into Stephen Miller's bedroom to catch him sleeping while hanging from the ceiling. It had all the hallmarks of the diagnosis by over 200 health professionals that he's a malignant narcissist. You can't argue that Trump's brand didn't meet the moment. He delivered spectacle over substance. Image over empathy. It was quite up for the challenge. Hell, I half expected him to grab a microphone a la Ivan Drago in Rocky IV. Say in a perfect St. Petersburg dialect, mirrored during nightly Zoom lessons with Putin, "if he dies, he dies." | | ---|---|--- His reaction to Findlay was the best metaphor possible for all we've seen of Trump's presidency and personality, all the consequences of electing pure immorality in gaseous and fluid form. Yes, , someone you wouldn't let watch your new iPhone, much less 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue. That's how you end up with a human sweat-gland as President who defies a court to purposely try and starve over 40 million hungry Americans --including over 20 million children. And it's not that he doesn't have the funds, which one would be forgiven for postulating, as Trump runs our government with the same hard-nosed planning and reality-based budgeting that highlighted his tenure at The Trump Taj Mahal. | | ---|---|--- Again: He has the funds. He has been ordered by a judge to disperse them. But the self-loathing lummox with the leisure suit chic wantsto starve people. So he responded to the judge's order by doubling down on withholding aid. The Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP), a food-stamp lifeline for millions , is still being deliberately delayed and partially unfunded. But, not one to pass up a fun time while depriving tens of millions of nutrition, while starving Americans, he threw himself a Great Gatsby party. Yes, a book whose main characters were described in this manner: They were careless people, Tom and Daisy--they smashed up things and creatures and then retreated back into their money or their vast carelessness, or whatever it was that kept them together, and let other people clean up the mess they had made | | ---|---|--- Because this is our dead-eyed, Dusky Shark President. A foul, necrotic wench who should be indicted again, this time for blowing irony's head off with a shotgun. The type of man who's vexed by someone keeling over in his office, showing all the compassion of a hyena with its leg caught in a trap. Or an Elon Musk. A human goiter who surrounds himself with similarly sick individuals who shoot puppies in the face, and whose moms write them un-fan mail about how they allegedly abuse women. And a guy who covers everything with gold because he thinks it will somehow imbue him with importance and elite status. And who uses food funds to build a Second Estate ballroom. "His top priority," per his twenty-something mouthpiece married to a Social Security recipient. | | ---|---|--- The office of the presidency now resembles the worst after-party you skipped because you had to work in the morning. Walls turned golden, moldings fattened, sign slapped beside the "Oval Office" label so no one misses the bling, as Americans watch their food and health care vanish, their workers deported and their jobs disappear. There's so much gold-generated gaudiness in the Oval Office that, if Goldfinger himself wandered in and looked around, he'd pause, tilt his head, and mutter: "What the fk is wrong with this guy?" At the end of the day, this isn't just a "bad look" moment--it's the crystallization of a presidency more preoccupied with the appearance of power than the exercise of responsibility. Yet, a president who watches a man collapse and is bemused, then disgusted, is the perfect wretch to run A Cult of Cruelty that's brought our teetering democracy to the edge. One that claims to be anti-trans, but has somehow transitioned Jesus Christ into Ayn Rand. Americans are going hungry, and a classless jack-in-the-box is gilding everything. A narcissistic dunce whose sociopathic shrug in the White House is the best single moment to explain everything that's wrong with our rotting republic. There must be Romans peering across the ocean, a knowing look in their eyes. They're surrounded by the remnants of their own Trump Era that tossed their great experiment into the large compost heap of history. two millennia ago, they know what's coming. ✨✨✨✨ | | ---|---|--- 🌟🌟BAM Merch Feature: Smash! Logo Tee🌟🌟 | | ---|---|--- * Invite your friends and earn rewards If you enjoy Blue Amp Media, share it with your friends and earn rewards when they subscribe. | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Cliff Schecter PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 ? ?

Peter,

AIPAC and corporate PACs have already chosen their candidate in this race,
and it’s not Abdul.

That’s because Abdul stands for something they can’t control: Ending
corporate greed, empowering working people, passing Medicare for All, and
refusing to let our tax dollars fund genocide overseas. Our campaign
fights for what the people want and deserve.

They know if Abdul wins, it’ll prove that grassroots movements can beat
billionaire-funded politics.

That’s why every single donation matters, even [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/547?c0=em-ms-aes-20251109-1-ak.kOvsVE&refcode=em20251109-1245&t=1004&akid=1255%2E251025%2EeaU-Hy ]$1.

Peter,
when someone pitches in $1, another follows. Then another.

Together, those small acts of solidarity become something powerful — a

Every $1 helps us:

* Share our message on college campuses, online, and over the air.
* Defeat our corporate PAC and AIPAC-backed primary opponent.

Team Abdul

name: Adelita Grijalva
subject: Speaker Johnson’s snarky comment about me -
body:
I know you’re likely getting a ton of emails from candidates and causes right now, Peter.
But I have to ask: Is there anything I can say to convince you to chip in $25 between Real Texas PAC and my Senate campaign in Ohio? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?refcode=101725_2]
What if I told you that right after I joined this race, experts at The Cook Political Report increased our odds of winning?
What if I told you that CNN and The New York Times report that Ohio is “in play” – but that corporate special interests are gearing up to spend millions against me?
What if I told you that misleading attack ads have already hit the airwaves – and that whether we’re able to counter these smears and reach voters with the truth depends on people like you?
This grassroots, small-dollar donor movement is our best chance to flip Ohio’s Senate seat. But we’re facing an uphill battle, and I need folks like you by my side to win.
So please, split $25 or more between Real Texas PAC and me to power our campaign forward, win in Ohio, and keep up the fight for working people. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?refcode=101725_2]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Sherrod Brown and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?express_lane=true&refcode=101725_2&amount=5]

Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?refcode=101725_2&amount=25]
Thank you so much,
Sherrod Brown

Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation.

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Roy Cooper
subject: This is why I keep asking.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
You can make the difference.
[](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/221?c0=em_ms_cp_20251109_2_cooper.shwqao&refcode=em20251109-2&t=1&akid=3381%2E582294%2EFDVeht)
I don’t mess around with something as important as representing my home.
Every race I’ve ever run, I’ve been in it to win — even when the odds seemed long. You’ve been there with me every time, and together, we’ve succeeded. Now, this election for the U.S. Senate may be our toughest challenge yet. So [**when I ask you to split a donation between our campaign and Chris Pappas, it’s because your contribution**](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251109_2_cooper.TCz1Gk&refcode=em20251109-2&t=2&akid=3381%2E582294%2EFDVeht) could make the difference between victory and defeat.
**Republicans see me as the top threat to their Senate majority. They know that we have the team, the support, and the momentum to win.** That means national attention will be on us.
I will always be straightforward about this campaign: our plans, where we stand in the polls, what we expect to come, and what we need from you.
Right now, we’re preparing for national GOP money groups to spend _hundreds of millions_ against us, and Democrats are being outraised by Republicans. Meanwhile, various polls have shown either a dead heat or us with a slight lead.
[**I am asking you to contribute $5 or another amount that fits in your budget today because we can’t afford to leave this race up to chance — or up to Republicans’ deep-pocketed donors and their dark-money groups. We can win this race, but ONLY if we stick together. Please, split a contribution between my campaign and Chris Pappas.**](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251109_2_cooper.TCz1Gk&refcode=em20251109-2&t=3&akid=3381%2E582294%2EFDVeht)
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251109_2_cooper.TCz1Gk&amount=5&refcode=em20251109-2&t=22&akid=3381%2E582294%2EFDVeht)**
I deeply appreciate all your support,
Roy Cooper
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20251109-2&t=23&refcode2=3381_582294_FDVeht&akid=3381%2E582294%2EFDVeht)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

name: Troy Downing
subject: I put so much hope into my last message - but it didn't work.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
I hoped & prayed for a huge response, but it wasn't enough.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTUwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTEwOV9XQi1ZTi4xMTAxMTdfdDE3NDc3MDMtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTExMDlfV0ItWU4uMTEwMTE3X3QxNzQ3NzAzLTI4OTkifQ/SF4hRVxN4eS9aHmyQU7PeQ)**This is the email I've waited all my life to send.**
I put so much hope into my last message - but it didn't work.
I hoped & prayed for a huge response, but it wasn't enough.
**Peter, I'm Troy Downing.** I bet you've never heard of me, but that's OK. I never thought in a million years I'd be sending you this final message pleading for your help.
I'm a combat veteran. A God-fearing Christian. A husband & a proud dad.

**[I'm also the conservative Republican running for re-election for Congress in Montana in the biggest race on the map.](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTUwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTEwOV9XQi1ZTi4xMTAxMTdfdDE3NDc3MDMtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTExMDlfV0ItWU4uMTEwMTE3X3QxNzQ3NzAzLTI4OTkifQ/1fx0TOdSA4j-E56SU_YIhg)**

Phony Republicans & the DC swamp have sold you out. That's NOT me. I'm making a simple promise to everyone reading this message:******I'll always tell the truth. ****
****I'll always put America First. ****
****I'll always have a backbone.** This is exactly why the lefties in Washington will smear me in the media, lie about me & end my run. They already have a $40 million in cash on hand to destroy every Republican like me.
I am swallowing my pride & pleading for your help. I'm not used to asking like this, so here it goes: [Do you have the heart to chip in just a few bucks to help me?](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTUwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTEwOV9XQi1ZTi4xMTAxMTdfdDE3NDc3MDMtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTExMDlfV0ItWU4uMTEwMTE3X3QxNzQ3NzAzLTI4OTkifQ/34ItbyrXiSdk2SGvI43D9A)****[ENLIST TODAY
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTUwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTEwOV9XQi1ZTi4xMTAxMTdfdDE3NDc3MDMtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTExMDlfV0ItWU4uMTEwMTE3X3QxNzQ3NzAzLTI4OTkifQ/SZ16sUKZ2mmJcrdQBZj5qA) I don't have the flashy campaign slogans or the high-tech stuff - I'm taking a leap of faith & praying that a few people read this message & are willing to stand with me.

Most people will count me out, but if we WIN this race it will bring the Radical Left to its knees.

I'm praying for a comeback, Peter - [will you help a combat vet like me?](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTUwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTEwOV9XQi1ZTi4xMTAxMTdfdDE3NDc3MDMtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTExMDlfV0ItWU4uMTEwMTE3X3QxNzQ3NzAzLTI4OTkifQ/maTR0Tpw3VUGhHPdic_7aQ)****[ENLIST TODAY
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTUwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTEwOV9XQi1ZTi4xMTAxMTdfdDE3NDc3MDMtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTExMDlfV0ItWU4uMTEwMTE3X3QxNzQ3NzAzLTI4OTkifQ/rHGJ26g1vT2iUhWlGdP7bQ) I'll never forget you helping me today.
Thank you & God bless.
Troy Downing****| |
---

body:
Honor veterans with a cold beer
For just $10, you can buy a veteran a beer at this year's American Valor Conference.

At this year's 28th annual **American Valor Conference** in November, veterans from World War II, Korea, Vietnam, and the War on Terror will gather in Washington, D.C. to share their stories with the next generation of cadets and midshipmen. During the conference our heroes will gather for a special evening reception. After a day of powerful storytelling, they'll have the chance to relax, reconnect, and raise a glass in camaraderie. **And you can be the one who makes that toast possible.** **[Friend, with a gift of just $10, you can buy a veteran a beer ... or give $25, $50, or more to raise a glass with many more heroes.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=a89be8479e6240888d30678f39ba8cc8&_e=WsaSxPOIe4IAKxmlntPkGOQAwFTjZHU8npIIOaROUO5QYK9p1bAh8TBia1DskkpdNg4lC8sobRPsElG8n_mj3ItB1rSiGYvc4XoRh59pn4JpI11FSSV5d_c3_LU8RylqzfIhozywnfZHi-QUXmb3aUP-OpizZFwhpe46q3ooKhxX8qvsIqVFAtJiItar1MvUVDyyX30ifTiSGECV_EtMzK1WWTjevi5pEmYYoXteL63w-NwVJu9nNUZqyIk-F8yvy2AlnXkdRoxwVYpT2m3hJFdR73cpyOQDqGUDsw-adzdoM7HA73eGEDLIV1DzTo6IlRMU_93mAQgH_JH9bcNyumBWKhSTycs72ouDxz7ip7yArD87VeDnA6W7JugHrZHyWGBFai9Kp-DSiQCbNHsprVkNAeNkV_z6cAcG0ZjT3yFEVEVEp0eqFRB3wS6bGVonrQrQkJm-8xPJE2ME9JIq_14rpbqdwlCbGydeC6ttSsjrVJ_wR60uQlVs0yFXxpDtd25Ac6ZGQi1mlWPV4qmNNeicroV27SDNBv-odfm_Pk57SkH3uIgbrpXAcxuHHeBsXtm-y5KtpuHnGG7vVTyh2EHymHi--vQog1MqtOXDX-4M1mM11WAcACRp4oQDCbzqQquoYve-6qV6AUd5vdv9sXNysC4q5hvG9E83SjUoQJdWZeGU_x9yG5yclydBvdGafoVzsvIWdZJANCNhPn6NYpl8DUK5xPYUokDHUFoFSCqlPzirfj7xobgUvaHk9PsdolxAV2AhrEgzdqoeGSeUBBx-gChQFC5J0Ov-Zui8kEj2ZUrmSwOuWI1wRj_TBbCf2Wg0FQpNf9jbTVqs-hiHww%3D%3D)**

The American Veterans Center (AVC) preserves and promotes the legacy of America's veterans -- from the Greatest Generation to today's warriors. Through oral histories, educational initiatives, and hosting the National Memorial Day Parade and our annual American Valor Conference and televised gala, **AVC ensures veterans ' stories are remembered and passed down and their legacies of service and sacrifice are never forgotten.**
---

The American Valor Conference is where America's heroes gather to share their stories with one another and the next generation of military leaders. Through panels, keynotes, and our nationally televised gala _American Valor: A Salute to Our Heroes_ , the conference preserves stories of sacrifice while inspiring tomorrow's leaders. When you give, you're buying a beer, yes -- but you're joining a mission that connects Americans to their heroes in ways both symbolic and unforgettable. **Friend, this simple gesture carries enormous meaning.** A cold beer at the end of the day becomes a toast to freedom, service, and sacrifice. _And your gift makes it possible._ **[Please, Friend, make your most generous gift today to buy a beer or for a veteran who deserves to know they are not forgotten.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=a89be8479e6240888d30678f39ba8cc8&_e=WsaSxPOIe4IAKxmlntPkGOQAwFTjZHU8npIIOaROUO5QYK9p1bAh8TBia1DskkpdNg4lC8sobRPsElG8n_mj3ItB1rSiGYvc4XoRh59pn4JpI11FSSV5d_c3_LU8RylqzfIhozywnfZHi-QUXmb3aUP-OpizZFwhpe46q3ooKhxX8qvsIqVFAtJiItar1MvUVDyyX30ifTiSGECV_EtMzK1WWTjevi5pEmYYoXteL63w-NwVJu9nNUZqyIk-F8yvy2AlnXkdRoxwVYpT2m3hJFdR73cpyOQDqGUDsw-adzdoM7HA73eGEDLIV1DzTo6IZG1uILdeKNMbCByZklW5vZhL8ZeysXHUuc7D5XvKUgkOZv30B2puOEQYeq_FmN-cOrOfJegHZzOB6ue3uoRwVIE1Opp3XYymDdMfztzHuLiLT2DN-ZAoq0tVv27Jzu_cI7t6Otk50BGf3EuC3rRR2Wm_C4V2ZVhHS56fDOl9rTqQR6pchTMSJkNhaCH4YS0vD974T4nQHXi18U9nzPHMp6jGSALFcYSl8G2d-7awSg_O8oM-75GJ6WGRLtcQUW61EMODkyoo4T6bWOx56xGyxNG71OuazBbzwgY5zPLUMuP2KBtMKUqwaE6Zbugb497mNQUjr_tPFQKMiwYpLKyp6JE2-PnQoDLn1xqaEUd5QqGWKGEJ9Ja2mJXHhibk_H0ILhkEqfRgTVgXazhp_Oxo2rbX36onQkrIsfKcntPJNXhUxWY-LVfrKrahuTd9CHgNIVtdGDeOVJDAN_DBr1cDb296jgR40s8bl6uIIuWNdNEfNXif2PsjeK4EHI7b-CJnq_KgxUnOtDSn2h0uQGekDw%3D%3D)** Of course, if you'd like to go further, you can also sponsor a meal for a veteran -- $50 for one meal, $100 for two, $250 for a table.

clean_body: Honor veterans with a cold beer For just $10, you can buy a veteran a beer at this year's American Valor Conference. | | | Friend, It's just a pint...but it means everything. At this year's 28th annual American Valor Conference in November, veterans from World War II, Korea, Vietnam, and the War on Terror will gather in Washington, D.C. to share their stories with the next generation of cadets and midshipmen. During the conference our heroes will gather for a special evening reception. After a day of powerful storytelling, they'll have the chance to relax, reconnect, and raise a glass in camaraderie. And you can be the one who makes that toast possible. The American Veterans Center (AVC) preserves and promotes the legacy of America's veterans -- from the Greatest Generation to today's warriors. Through oral histories, educational initiatives, and hosting the National Memorial Day Parade and our annual American Valor Conference and televised gala, AVC ensures veterans ' stories are remembered and passed down and their legacies of service and sacrifice are never forgotten. The American Valor Conference is where America's heroes gather to share their stories with one another and the next generation of military leaders. Through panels, keynotes, and our nationally televised gala American Valor: A Salute to Our Heroes , the conference preserves stories of sacrifice while inspiring tomorrow's leaders. When you give, you're buying a beer, yes -- but you're joining a mission that connects Americans to their heroes in ways both symbolic and unforgettable. Friend, this simple gesture carries enormous meaning. A cold beer at the end of the day becomes a toast to freedom, service, and sacrifice. And your gift makes it possible. Of course, if you'd like to go further, you can also sponsor a meal for a veteran -- $50 for one meal, $100 for two, $250 for a table. Moments like these shape lives, Friend. At last year's conference, a cadet from Texas A&M called the experience of sharing a pint with WWII heroes "truly inspirational -- something I will never forget." At nearly every meal, young cadets will sit side-by-side with World War II heroes, listening to stories of Normandy, Iwo Jima, and the Chosin Reservoir - thanks to you. At the evening reception, post-9/11 veterans will raise a glass in fellowship - thanks to you. These simple moments carry a profound message: America remembers, honors, and thanks her veterans - and inspires the next generation to follow in their footsteps. Your generosity ensures every veteran at the conference feels the gratitude of a grateful nation -- and inspires the next generation to follow in their footsteps. Tim Holbert President American Veterans Center The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center 1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201

name: Jon Husted
subject: Together We Can Put Faith First in Washington
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Dear fellow patriot,

This is Senator Jon Husted.

From the very beginning, faith has shaped my life and given me hope. I
was born into a foster home, facing uncertainty and challenges from
day one. But everything changed when two loving parents chose to adopt
me and give me a second chance.

THEIR LOVE WAS A POWERFUL EXAMPLE OF FAITH IN ACTION, AND IT TAUGHT ME
THAT, WITH FAITH, ANYTHING IS POSSIBLE.
[https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/faith-in-the-lord-jhusted-e-wama/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=wama_HERE&utm_campaign=faithinthelord-jh_jhusted_nrsc&utm_content=fundraising&amtposition=4&amt4=100&recurring=true&ex_tid=20251106_TW-5L.117501_t1745283-575]

Growing up, I was told I’d never play college football. But, through
faith, hard work, and determination, I defied the odds and helped lead
my team to a National Championship.

That same faith now guides me in a different arena: the halls of the
Senate, where I fight every day for the values that matter most to
Ohio and America.
#
[https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/faith-in-the-lord-jhusted-e-wama/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=wama_HERE&utm_campaign=faithinthelord-jh_jhusted_nrsc&utm_content=fundraising&amtposition=4&amt4=100&recurring=true&ex_tid=20251106_TW-5L.117501_t1745283-575]
HELP PUT FAITH FIRST IN THE SENATE
[https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/faith-in-the-lord-jhusted-e-wama/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=wama_HERE&utm_campaign=faithinthelord-jh_jhusted_nrsc&utm_content=fundraising&amtposition=4&amt4=100&recurring=true&ex_tid=20251106_TW-5L.117501_t1745283-575]

Right now, those values—and voices of faith—are under attack. The
Radical Left wants to silence us. They want to erase faith from public
life and tear down the foundation of our nation. But I refuse to back
down. I stand firm because I know that our freedoms, our families, and
our future depend on it.
HELP PUT FAITH FIRST IN THE SENATE
[https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/faith-in-the-lord-jhusted-e-wama/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=wama_HERE&utm_campaign=faithinthelord-jh_jhusted_nrsc&utm_content=fundraising&amtposition=4&amt4=100&recurring=true&ex_tid=20251106_TW-5L.117501_t1745283-575]

Throughout my life, I’ve faced dark valleys and tough challenges,
but the Lord has always been my strength and shield. His guidance
keeps me strong, and now, I’M ASKING YOU TO JOIN ME IN PUTTING FAITH
FIRST IN THE SENATE.
[https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/faith-in-the-lord-jhusted-e-wama/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=wama_HERE&utm_campaign=faithinthelord-jh_jhusted_nrsc&utm_content=fundraising&amtposition=4&amt4=100&recurring=true&ex_tid=20251106_TW-5L.117501_t1745283-575]

Friend, will you lend a hand today?

Your support is crucial to help me defend our freedoms, protect
religious liberty, and fight back against those who want to erase
faith from America’s public square.
HELP PUT FAITH FIRST IN THE SENATE
[https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/faith-in-the-lord-jhusted-e-wama/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=wama_HERE&utm_campaign=faithinthelord-jh_jhusted_nrsc&utm_content=fundraising&amtposition=4&amt4=100&recurring=true&ex_tid=20251106_TW-5L.117501_t1745283-575]

Together, with faith as our guide, we can protect the America we
love—and ensure that voices of faith continue to ring out loud and
clear in Washington.

Sincerely,

#
[https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/faith-in-the-lord-jhusted-e-wama/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=wama_HERE&utm_campaign=faithinthelord-jh_jhusted_nrsc&utm_content=fundraising&amtposition=4&amt4=100&recurring=true&ex_tid=20251106_TW-5L.117501_t1745283-575]
Jon Husted

[https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/finish-your-donation]

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
www.NRSC.org [https://www.nrsc.org/]

name: Research Team [Voter Action Project]
subject: Do you believe in statehood for D.C.?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
WaPo Opinion: D.C. statehood is a voting rights issue [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/WaPo_DC_Statehood_VotingRights.png]
If Washington, D.C. was a state, the U.S. Senate would look different and the landscape for critical legislation would definitely be altered. While it doesn't have the square mileage of other states, D.C. would actually be ahead of Wyoming and Vermont in terms of population ( according to the 2020 census ).
We want to hear from 87 more voters in your area to get their feelings on the topic. Will you take our one-question poll right away?
Team: Should Washington, D.C. be a state?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=110925_1yes&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=110925_1no&amount=15]

clean_body: WaPo Opinion: D.C. statehood is a voting rights issue [] If Washington, D.C. was a state, the U.S. Senate would look different and the landscape for critical legislation would definitely be altered. While it doesn't have the square mileage of other states, D.C. would actually be ahead of Wyoming and Vermont in terms of population ( according to the 2020 census ). We want to hear from 87 more voters in your area to get their feelings on the topic. Will you take our one-question poll right away? Team: Should Washington, D.C. be a state? By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded: YES [] NO [] Voter Action Project [] [] [] [] [] Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Andrea Salinas
subject: quick question:
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
Sorry to be so direct, but I wouldn’t ask if it weren’t important.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118981029/581529991/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMGQyNTc4OS1iOWJkLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IIKV2c0nDX5pTNyIZ3BZ0d9Td3NhLfpooS8xf5l-NHQ=) **[Sorry to be direct, but I’m about to ask you to chip in $6 to help fund my campaign. I’ll explain why your support is so critical in a minute, but if you’re already with me, can I count on you to pitch in $6 to keep OR-06 blue? →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118981030/581529992/1477919608?amount=6&refcode=email_110925_6forOR6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMGQyNTc4OS1iOWJkLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IIKV2c0nDX5pTNyIZ3BZ0d9Td3NhLfpooS8xf5l-NHQ=)** | | **[DONATE $6 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118981031/581529993/1477919608?amount=6&refcode=email_110925_6forOR6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMGQyNTc4OS1iOWJkLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IIKV2c0nDX5pTNyIZ3BZ0d9Td3NhLfpooS8xf5l-NHQ=)**
---
The stakes couldn’t be higher: **The path to a Democratic House majority runs straight through Oregon’s 6th district, making this seat a MUST-HOLD in 2026.**
But if you need more convincing before sending in a donation to defend OR-06, here are just THREE reasons why I’m asking for your support today:
1️⃣ **I’m doing everything in my power to ensure every American’s voice is heard, and to defend our communities from Trump and the GOP’s attacks.** While Trump is sending troops into our cities, I’m meeting with constituents, standing up to stop Republicans' cuts to health care, and fighting to end the GOP shutdown.
2️⃣ **Republicans have a RAZOR-THIN Majority, and are spending MILLIONS to target OR-06 and defeat me.** They’ve already come within single digits of flipping this seat TWICE — and they're willing to do whatever it takes to bring a strong Democrat like me down.

subject: A trip down memory lane
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HICKENLOOPER FOR COLORADO
body:
As a kid, John was never the strongest, the fastest, or heck, even the smartest kid on the playground.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118981052/581530072/1435897075?refcode=email_110925_story&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWE1NjI0NC1iYWJkLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YeDaOsIuGg5RxRHEq15n3uNxQj1TuRyivDpYccpcBcY=&emci=5f60bc3c-babd-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=eaa56244-babd-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=7280715) As a kid, John was never the strongest, the fastest, or heck, even the smartest kid on the playground. **But one thing he learned was that through determination, hard work, and perseverance — any challenge can be overcome.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118981053/581530073/910623595?amounts=5%2C15%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode=email_110925_story&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWE1NjI0NC1iYWJkLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YeDaOsIuGg5RxRHEq15n3uNxQj1TuRyivDpYccpcBcY=) In those early days, John didn’t have a single political bone in his body — he studied science and began his career as a geologist... [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118981054/581530074/910623595?amounts=5%2C15%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode=email_110925_story&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWE1NjI0NC1iYWJkLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YeDaOsIuGg5RxRHEq15n3uNxQj1TuRyivDpYccpcBcY=) ...until the company he worked for got bought out, leaving John laid off for 27 straight months. So he gathered the friends he trusted most, and they all pitched in on a huge gamble: **opening Colorado’s very first brewpub, Wynkoop Brewing Company.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118981055/581530075/910623595?amounts=5%2C15%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode=email_110925_story&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWE1NjI0NC1iYWJkLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YeDaOsIuGg5RxRHEq15n3uNxQj1TuRyivDpYccpcBcY=) John and his partners worked hard to build a successful business, but as time went on, John saw firsthand just how often the government seemed to work against the little guy — farmers, working people, and small business owners like him. **So he took a big leap of faith, ran for Mayor of Denver — _and won._** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118981056/581530076/910623595?amounts=5%2C15%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode=email_110925_story&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWE1NjI0NC1iYWJkLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YeDaOsIuGg5RxRHEq15n3uNxQj1TuRyivDpYccpcBcY=) John later went on to serve two terms as Governor of Colorado. Then, in 2020, John flipped Colorado’s Senate seat from red-to-blue, and immediately got to work delivering big wins for working families and our environment. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118981057/581530077/910623595?amounts=5%2C15%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode=email_110925_story&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWE1NjI0NC1iYWJkLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YeDaOsIuGg5RxRHEq15n3uNxQj1TuRyivDpYccpcBcY=) But now with Donald Trump back in office, abusing his power to advance the extreme MAGA agenda and pushing our economy towards recession, John is doing everything in his power to fight back and protect working people from the worst of the GOP’s attacks. **Flipping the Senate blue in 2026 is a crucial step in John’s plan to fight back.[_That starts with defending Colorado, or else Democrats have _no shot_ of taking back the majority. It won’t be easy, but if you’re as ready for this fight as John is, can we count on you to chip in to our campaign for re-election today and put our team in the strongest possible position to keep Colorado blue on Election Day?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118981058/581530078/41684922?amounts=5,15,25,50,100,250&refcode=email_110925_story&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWE1NjI0NC1iYWJkLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YeDaOsIuGg5RxRHEq15n3uNxQj1TuRyivDpYccpcBcY=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118981059/581530079/910623595?express_lane=true&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=5&refcode=email_110925_story&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWE1NjI0NC1iYWJkLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YeDaOsIuGg5RxRHEq15n3uNxQj1TuRyivDpYccpcBcY=)

clean_body: As a kid, John was never the strongest, the fastest, or heck, even the smartest kid on the playground. As a kid, John was never the strongest, the fastest, or heck, even the smartest kid on the playground. But one thing he learned was that through determination, hard work, and perseverance — any challenge can be overcome. = In those early days, John didn’t have a single political bone in his body — he studied science and began his career as a geologist... = ...until the company he worked for got bought out, leaving John laid off for 27 straight months. So he gathered the friends he trusted most, and they all pitched in on a huge gamble: opening Colorado’s very first brewpub, Wynkoop Brewing Company. = John and his partners worked hard to build a successful business, but as time went on, John saw firsthand just how often the government seemed to work against the little guy — farmers, working people, and small business owners like him. So he took a big leap of faith, ran for Mayor of Denver — and won. = John later went on to serve two terms as Governor of Colorado. Then, in 2020, John flipped Colorado’s Senate seat from red-to-blue, and immediately got to work delivering big wins for working families and our environment. = But now with Donald Trump back in office, abusing his power to advance the extreme MAGA agenda and pushing our economy towards recession, John is doing everything in his power to fight back and protect working people from the worst of the GOP’s attacks. name: Deb Haaland
subject: most people running for office wouldn’t choose to speak candidly about alcohol addiction
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
Thank you for hearing my story.
Peter, Deb Haaland here and I want to tell you about a milestone I’m proud of: **I have reached 35 years of sobriety.**
Most people running for office wouldn’t choose to speak candidly about alcohol addiction. But I’m not like most people running for office. My story is different.
I was about 23 years old when I made the brave decision to get sober. It was a struggle at first, but I persevered because I was committed to doing all I could. I went to AA meetings and probably read 20 books on addiction.
My struggles made me fierce, which is why I chose to speak openly about my sobriety in my very first campaign ad when I ran for Congress 7 years ago. And I’m so glad I did. I'll never forget the day we went to the Marigold Parade in the South Valley, and people came up to me right and left and thanked me for my honesty in my ad. They shared stories about themselves, their parents, and their loved ones struggling with addiction, and it brought tears to my eyes that people felt represented by someone like me.
**My journey to sobriety taught me that you must face hard truths if you want to make change, which is why I’ll never shy away from the tough fights that lie ahead for New Mexico.**
High prices, homelessness, crime, and addiction weigh heavy on our state. As Governor, I will address these head on by investing in addiction services, helping families get the resources to support their loved ones, and requiring health insurers in New Mexico to cover drug and alcohol treatment.
**My promise to you, Peter: I will always be honest about topics other politicians might try to sweep under the rug, because I believe if we’re brave, we can heal.**
Thank you for hearing my story. That’s how we’ll win this race — by sharing our stories, lifting each other up, and being fierce enough to fight for the bright future New Mexicans deserve. **[If you can, I’d be so grateful if you’d pitch in a split donation of $10 between my campaign and Heartland Patriots so we can keep sharing our stories across New Mexico and beyond to hear from as many voices as possible and win this race.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97466?refcode=em20251109-9685&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9685%2E614464%2E1k9aax)**

clean_body: Thank you for hearing my story. Peter, Deb Haaland here and I want to tell you about a milestone I’m proud of: I have reached 35 years of sobriety. Most people running for office wouldn’t choose to speak candidly about alcohol addiction. But I’m not like most people running for office. My story is different. I was about 23 years old when I made the brave decision to get sober. It was a struggle at first, but I persevered because I was committed to doing all I could. I went to AA meetings and probably read 20 books on addiction. My struggles made me fierce, which is why I chose to speak openly about my sobriety in my very first campaign ad when I ran for Congress 7 years ago. And I’m so glad I did. I'll never forget the day we went to the Marigold Parade in the South Valley, and people came up to me right and left and thanked me for my honesty in my ad. They shared stories about themselves, their parents, and their loved ones struggling with addiction, and it brought tears to my eyes that people felt represented by someone like me. My journey to sobriety taught me that you must face hard truths if you want to make change, which is why I’ll never shy away from the tough fights that lie ahead for New Mexico. High prices, homelessness, crime, and addiction weigh heavy on our state. As Governor, I will address these head on by investing in addiction services, helping families get the resources to support their loved ones, and requiring health insurers in New Mexico to cover drug and alcohol treatment. My promise to you, Peter: I will always be honest about topics other politicians might try to sweep under the rug, because I believe if we’re brave, we can heal. Thank you for hearing my story. That’s how we’ll win this race — by sharing our stories, lifting each other up, and being fierce enough to fight for the bright future New Mexicans deserve. If you have stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, we will process your contribution to Deb Haaland and Heartland Patriots instantly: Thank you for everything. Deb | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.

name: Jahana Hayes
subject: I am appalled by recent cuts at the Department of Education.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jahana Hayes
body:
| | Team, I’m an educator, a mom, and a member of the House Education Committee – and I am _appalled_ by recent cuts at the Department of Education. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118981252/581530768/-1662636879?refcode=AU_JH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20251109_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGVmOTY5OS1iZmJkLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=efoAEP0W_yKatb2knqLk9Z6cNgegAHv1R7VQT4Vc0xU=&emci=7fef9699-bfbd-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=80ef9699-bfbd-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=15529135) This latest round of layoffs decimates the department responsible for special education services for 7.5 million students. As a teacher myself, I know that students can excel academically when the right accommodations are in place. This move is a cruel gesture that puts so many students at risk. **[Add your name to stand with me in the fight for our teachers, students, and school staff.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118981253/581530769/-1662636879?refcode=AU_JH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20251109_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGVmOTY5OS1iZmJkLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=efoAEP0W_yKatb2knqLk9Z6cNgegAHv1R7VQT4Vc0xU=&emci=7fef9699-bfbd-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=80ef9699-bfbd-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=15529135)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118981254/581530770/-1662636879?refcode=AU_JH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20251109_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGVmOTY5OS1iZmJkLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=efoAEP0W_yKatb2knqLk9Z6cNgegAHv1R7VQT4Vc0xU=&emci=7fef9699-bfbd-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=80ef9699-bfbd-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=15529135)
---
Teachers know they have a fighter in me. I proved that when I introduced bills to invest in more support for educators, increase recruitment and retention to keep teachers in the classroom, and diversify the education workforce to meet the unique needs of our communities.
**[I won’t stop standing up for our educators, and I hope you won’t either. Take just a moment to sign my petition.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118981255/581530771/-1662636879?refcode=AU_JH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20251109_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGVmOTY5OS1iZmJkLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=efoAEP0W_yKatb2knqLk9Z6cNgegAHv1R7VQT4Vc0xU=&emci=7fef9699-bfbd-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=80ef9699-bfbd-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=15529135)**

clean_body: | | Team, I’m an educator, a mom, and a member of the House Education Committee – and I am appalled by recent cuts at the Department of Education. This latest round of layoffs decimates the department responsible for special education services for 7.5 million students. As a teacher myself, I know that students can excel academically when the right accommodations are in place. This move is a cruel gesture that puts so many students at risk. | Teachers know they have a fighter in me. I proved that when I introduced bills to invest in more support for educators, increase recruitment and retention to keep teachers in the classroom, and diversify the education workforce to meet the unique needs of our communities. Thank you for standing up, Jahana Hayes = | | About Jahana** Jahana Hayes proudly represents Connecticut's 5th Congressional district. name: Adam Schiff
subject: Just one example of the real-world devastation caused by this administration
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=9167%2E5257348%2E2GjFRv ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek,

For all the chaos and petty drama Trump and his Republican enablers cause,
we cannot lose sight of the real and serious implications of their
administration.

Here’s just one example:

This past spring, the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services decided
to re-measure the distance between rural hospitals to see if they could
cut off funding to some of them. If one critical access hospital is less
than 35 miles from another, it can lose its designation and lose millions
in federal funding.

As it turned out, there are a number of such hospitals in the country, and
now the federal government is cutting them off. Even for hospitals that
are 33 miles away, instead of the required 35.

That is devastating and potentially life-threatening for residents of
these rural counties across the country, since it likely means that most
of these hospitals will close.

With this news, plus the higher health care premiums caused by the
Republican shutdown, and the massive cuts to Medicaid that will go into
effect in a year, health care access will be lost for millions of
Americans.

These are the stakes. Beyond the demolition of the East Wing, the petty
feuds on Truth Social, the endless scandals — people's lives and abilities
to take care of their families are on the line.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em.dd-KUe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20251109_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=9167%2E5257348%2E2GjFRv ]That’s what keeps me fighting,
Derek. To prepare for the battles
ahead, I'm humbly asking for your support today. Can I count on you to
chip in to support my fight to deliver for working people, no matter what
petty nonsense Trump throws at us?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1040?c0=q42025_abs_em.jqUSqt&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20251109_PM1_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=9167%2E5257348%2E2GjFRv ]EXPRESS DONATE $5

If we stay focused and stick together, we can win the battles that really

clean_body: [ ]Adam Schiff for Senate Derek, For all the chaos and petty drama Trump and his Republican enablers cause, we cannot lose sight of the real and serious implications of their administration. Here’s just one example: This past spring, the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services decided to re-measure the distance between rural hospitals to see if they could cut off funding to some of them. If one critical access hospital is less than 35 miles from another, it can lose its designation and lose millions in federal funding. As it turned out, there are a number of such hospitals in the country, and now the federal government is cutting them off. Even for hospitals that are 33 miles away, instead of the required 35. That is devastating and potentially life-threatening for residents of these rural counties across the country, since it likely means that most of these hospitals will close. With this news, plus the higher health care premiums caused by the Republican shutdown, and the massive cuts to Medicaid that will go into effect in a year, health care access will be lost for millions of Americans. These are the stakes. Beyond the demolition of the East Wing, the petty feuds on Truth Social, the endless scandals — people's lives and abilities to take care of their families are on the line. [ ]That’s what keeps me fighting, Derek. To prepare for the battles ahead, I'm humbly asking for your support today. Can I count on you to chip in to support my fight to deliver for working people, no matter what petty nonsense Trump throws at us? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $5 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $15 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $50 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $100 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $250 [ ]ANOTHER AMOUNT If we stay focused and stick together, we can win the battles that really matter. Thanks for having my back. Adam [ ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner; text Schiff to 724433 [ ]DONATE MONTHLY 135 E. body:
My family taught me to fight for Maine and its people. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118981653/581532292/-530215862?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.11.09_OTS-Janet-Mills-Split_B2_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTliNDZmMS1jMGJkLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_o_DKl1IIj4ZjVGUEjxlId5ZyESoxS8Ha9WGAXh43AM=)
My roots run deep. My mom’s parents toiled in the fields of Aroostook County, harvesting potatoes with dirt under their fingernails. My dad’s parents come from a long line of granite carvers in Stonington. My dad served in the U.S. Navy during World War II and taught me the value of hard work from an early age. My mom taught high school English for 35 years and showed me how powerful words are. **Above all else, my family taught me to fight for the great state of Maine and its people. In my years of public service, I have always believed this: that you – Maine people – are our greatest asset.** **_[That’s why I’m running for Senate. Because Mainers deserve a leader willing to fight for them no matter what. # [Rambling & Remembering](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=178375220&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc4Mzc1MjIwLCJpYXQiOjE3NjI3MzEyNjEsImV4cCI6MTc2NTMyMzI2MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.bFZT0vM5XlpGrA-8uSWbOj99EYt1rXV37Hk9PAWBSUA)
### Reflecting on the week's developments and remembering an American leader and patriot.
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/@mansharamani)
---
| Nov 9
---
| [](https://substack.com/@mansharamani)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=178375220&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc4Mzc1MjIwLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc2MjczMTI2MSwiZXhwIjoxNzY1MzIzMjYxLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTY2MTk5OSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.j9jbueey2ZCccgXK_7-UufONJrJ8d_D741Yr-vWPP2s&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=178375220&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc4Mzc1MjIwLCJpYXQiOjE3NjI3MzEyNjEsImV4cCI6MTc2NTMyMzI2MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.bFZT0vM5XlpGrA-8uSWbOj99EYt1rXV37Hk9PAWBSUA&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
